narrative_analysis: Kenyan girls in informal settlements appear as exploited by structural neglect, their education and dignity blocked by unaddressed menstrual poverty and stigma.
cui_bono: Sanitary product corporations and local government officials who fail to provide supplies.
summary: Menstrual stigma, lack of sanitary products, and poor sanitation in Kenyan informal settlements disrupt girls' education and dignity. Advocates highlight how these systemic failures reinforce inequality and keep girls from fully participating in school.
title_en: Menstrual stigma, lack of sanitary towels keep girls out of school in informal settlements
title_es: El estigma menstrual y la falta de toallas sanitarias mantienen a las niñas fuera de la escuela en asentamientos informales
title_pt: Estigma menstrual e falta de absorventes afastam meninas da escola em assentamentos informais
title_fr: Stigmatisation des règles et manque de serviettes hygiéniques excluent les filles de l'école dans les quartiers informels
summary_es: El estigma menstrual, la falta de productos sanitarios y el saneamiento deficiente en los asentamientos informales de Kenia interrumpen la educación y la dignidad de las niñas. Los defensores señalan que estas fallas sistémicas refuerzan la desigualdad y mantienen a las niñas fuera de la escuela.
summary_pt: O estigma menstrual, a falta de produtos sanitários e o saneamento precário nos assentamentos informais do Quênia interrompem a educação e a dignidade das meninas. Defensores destacam que essas falhas sistêmicas reforçam a desigualdade e mantêm as meninas fora da escola.
summary_fr: La stigmatisation des règles, le manque de produits sanitaires et un assainissement défaillant dans les quartiers informels du Kenya perturbent l'éducation et la dignité des filles. Les militants soulignent que ces échecs systémiques renforcent les inégalités et excluent les filles de l'école.
title: HEALTH & SCIENCE

narrative_analysis: Zimbabweans struggling with cash shortages are shown as pawns in a rigged system where elites dodge the ZiG policy. This portrayal highlights economic exploitation and deepening inequality.
cui_bono: Kudakwashe Tagwirei and connected elites
summary: The lavish wedding of Kudakwashe Tagwirei's son sparks debate over Zimbabwe's ZiG currency policy, which many see as benefiting elites while ordinary people face cash shortages. The event highlights deep inequality and questions about who truly profits from the country's financial system.
title_en: ZiG for the people, dollars for the elite? Tagwirei wedding reignites Zimbabwe currency debate
title_es: ¿ZiG para el pueblo, dólares para la élite? La boda de Tagwirei reaviva el debate sobre la moneda en Zimbabue
title_pt: ZiG para o povo, dólares para a elite? Casamento de Tagwirei reacende debate sobre a moeda no Zimbábue
title_fr: ZiG pour le peuple, dollars pour l'élite ? Le mariage de Tagwirei relance le débat sur la monnaie au Zimbabwe
summary_es: La lujosa boda del hijo de Kudakwashe Tagwirei desata un debate sobre la política monetaria ZiG de Zimbabue, que muchos consideran beneficia a las élites mientras la gente común enfrenta escasez de efectivo. El evento resalta la profunda desigualdad y las dudas sobre quién realmente se beneficia del sistema financiero.
summary_pt: O casamento luxuoso do filho de Kudakwashe Tagwirei reacende o debate sobre a política monetária ZiG do Zimbábue, que muitos veem como benéfica para as elites enquanto o povo comum enfrenta escassez de dinheiro. O evento destaca a profunda desigualdade e dúvidas sobre quem realmente lucra com o sistema financeiro.
summary_fr: Le mariage somptueux du fils de Kudakwashe Tagwirei ravive le débat sur la politique monétaire ZiG du Zimbabwe, que beaucoup considèrent comme bénéfique pour les élites tandis que les gens ordinaires font face à des pénuries de liquidités. L'événement met en lumière les profondes inégalités et les interrogations sur qui profite réellement du système financier.
title: holla dollaZiG for the people, dollars for the elite? Tagwirei wedding reignites Zimbabwe currency debateAs Zimbabweans grapple with cash shortages, the lavish wedding for the son of tenderpreneur businessman Kudakwashe Tagwirei has opened old wounds over who benefits from the ZiG policy – and who gets to ignore it.

narrative_analysis: Kenyans are portrayed as navigating a political minefield where ethnic profiling threatens to spark violence, revealing how colonial divisions still shape electoral conflict.
cui_bono: Kenyan political elites who mobilize ethnic blocs for power.
summary: The article warns that ethnic political profiling by Kenyan leaders could ignite violence ahead of the 2027 elections. It traces this dynamic to colonial-era ethnic divisions that remain exploited for political gain.
title_en: Kenya: How ethnic political profiling could trigger violence ahead of the 2027 polls
title_es: Kenia: Cómo el perfilamiento político étnico podría desencadenar violencia antes de las elecciones de 2027
title_pt: Quênia: Como a definição de perfis políticos étnicos pode desencadear violência antes das eleições de 2027
title_fr: Kenya : Comment le profilage politique ethnique pourrait déclencher des violences avant les élections de 2027
summary_es: El artículo advierte que el perfilamiento político étnico por parte de líderes kenianos podría provocar violencia antes de las elecciones de 2027. Esta dinámica se remonta a las divisiones étnicas de la época colonial que aún se explotan para obtener ventajas políticas.
summary_pt: O artigo alerta que a definição de perfis políticos étnicos por líderes quenianos pode provocar violência antes das eleições de 2027. Essa dinâmica remonta às divisões étnicas da era colonial que ainda são exploradas para ganho político.
summary_fr: L'article avertit que le profilage politique ethnique par les dirigeants kenyans pourrait déclencher des violences avant les élections de 2027. Cette dynamique remonte aux divisions ethniques de l'ère coloniale encore exploitées à des fins politiques.
title: not againKenya: How ethnic political profiling could trigger violence ahead of the 2027 polls

narrative_analysis: Portrayed as navigating a complex electoral process amid conflict, Ethiopians are depicted as political actors rather than victims, yet their agency is circumscribed by structural violence.
cui_bono: Ethiopian federal government and regional elites.
summary: The article examines five key issues in Ethiopia's upcoming election, including the impact of ongoing civil conflict, ethnic tensions, and voter disenfranchisement. It highlights challenges to democratic processes amidst state repression and humanitarian crises.
title_en: 5 things to watch in Ethiopia’s election under the shadow of conflict
title_es: 5 cosas a observar en las elecciones de Etiopía bajo la sombra del conflicto
title_pt: 5 coisas para observar nas eleições da Etiópia sob a sombra do conflito
title_fr: 5 choses à surveiller dans les élections éthiopiennes sous l'ombre du conflit
summary_es: El artículo examina cinco cuestiones clave en las próximas elecciones de Etiopía, incluyendo el impacto del conflicto civil en curso, tensiones étnicas y la privación del derecho al voto. Destaca los desafíos a los procesos democráticos en medio de la represión estatal y crisis humanitarias.
summary_pt: O artigo examina cinco questões-chave nas próximas eleições da Etiópia, incluindo o impacto do conflito civil em curso, tensões étnicas e a privação do direito ao voto. Destaca os desafios aos processos democráticos em meio à repressão estatal e crises humanitárias.
summary_fr: L'article examine cinq questions clés dans les prochaines élections éthiopiennes, notamment l'impact du conflit civil en cours, les tensions ethniques et la privation du droit de vote. Il met en lumière les défis des processus démocratiques au milieu de la répression étatique et des crises humanitaires.
title: democracy dance5 things to watch in Ethiopia’s election under the shadow of conflict

narrative_analysis: Kenyan communities are portrayed as legally pushing back against a U.S.-run quarantine center, asserting sovereignty and questioning foreign intervention.
cui_bono: U.S. military or health agencies seeking to manage regional outbreaks.
summary: A Kenyan court has temporarily blocked the opening of a U.S.-funded Ebola quarantine center, citing legal and transparency concerns. The ruling reflects tensions over foreign medical interventions in the region.
title_en: Kenya court suspends opening of US Ebola quarantine centre
title_es: Tribunal de Kenia suspende la apertura de un centro de cuarentena contra el ébola de EE.UU.
title_pt: Tribunal do Quênia suspende abertura de centro de quarentena contra Ebola dos EUA
title_fr: Un tribunal kenyan suspend l'ouverture d'un centre de quarantaine contre Ebola des États-Unis
summary_es: Un tribunal keniano ha bloqueado temporalmente la apertura de un centro de cuarentena contra el ébola financiado por EE.UU., citando problemas legales y de transparencia. La decisión refleja tensiones sobre intervenciones médicas extranjeras en la región.
summary_pt: Um tribunal queniano suspendeu temporariamente a abertura de um centro de quarentena contra o Ebola financiado pelos EUA, citando questões legais e de transparência. A decisão reflete tensões sobre intervenções médicas estrangeiras na região.
summary_fr: Un tribunal kenyan a temporairement bloqué l'ouverture d'un centre de quarantaine contre Ebola financé par les États-Unis, invoquant des préoccupations juridiques et de transparence. Cette décision reflète les tensions autour des interventions médicales étrangères dans la région.
title: hold upKenya court suspends opening of US Ebola quarantine centre

narrative_analysis: South Africa's industrial decline is presented as a competitive loss to Morocco, with Black workers' unemployment treated as an inevitable economic statistic rather than a human crisis.
cui_bono: Morocco's government and automotive industry.
summary: The article examines how Morocco has overtaken South Africa as Africa's leading industrial power, particularly in automotive manufacturing. It attributes South Africa's decline to policy failures, labor costs, and infrastructure problems, while noting the impact on Black workers.
title_en: How Morocco stole South Africa’s industrial crown
title_es: Cómo Marruecos le robó la corona industrial a Sudáfrica
title_pt: Como Marrocos roubou a coroa industrial da África do Sul
title_fr: Comment le Maroc a volé la couronne industrielle de l'Afrique du Sud
summary_es: El artículo analiza cómo Marruecos ha superado a Sudáfrica como potencia industrial líder en África, especialmente en la fabricación de automóviles. Atribuye el declive sudafricano a fracasos políticos, costos laborales y problemas de infraestructura, señalando el impacto en los trabajadores negros.
summary_pt: O artigo examina como Marrocos ultrapassou a África do Sul como principal potência industrial da África, especialmente na fabricação de automóveis. Atribui o declínio sul-africano a falhas políticas, custos trabalhistas e problemas de infraestrutura, destacando o impacto sobre os trabalhadores negros.
summary_fr: L'article examine comment le Maroc a dépassé l'Afrique du Sud en tant que principale puissance industrielle africaine, notamment dans la fabrication automobile. Il attribue le déclin sud-africain à des échecs politiques, des coûts de main-d'œuvre et des problèmes d'infrastructure, soulignant l'impact sur les travailleurs noirs.
title: good businessHow Morocco stole South Africa’s industrial crown

narrative_analysis: The story presents Ousmane Sonko as a politically ambitious individual navigating elite rivalries, reducing Black political agency to personal power struggles rather than collective liberation.
cui_bono: Senegal's established political elite and President Faye.
summary: The article covers the dismissal of Senegal's Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko by President Bassirou Diomaye Faye, examining Sonko's return to opposition politics and his bid for parliamentary speaker. It focuses on the political maneuvering and personal dynamics between the two leaders, within Senegal's post-colonial democratic system.
title_en: Sacked Senegal prime minister Ousmane Sonko returns to being the opposition
title_es: El destituido primer ministro de Senegal, Ousmane Sonko, regresa a la oposición
title_pt: Primeiro-ministro demitido do Senegal, Ousmane Sonko, retorna à oposição
title_fr: Le Premier ministre sénégalais limogé Ousmane Sonko retourne dans l'opposition
summary_es: El artículo cubre la destitución del Primer Ministro de Senegal, Ousmane Sonko, por el presidente Bassirou Diomaye Faye, examinando su regreso a la oposición y su candidatura a presidente de la Asamblea Nacional. Se centra en las maniobras políticas y las dinámicas personales entre ambos líderes dentro del sistema democrático poscolonial de Senegal.
summary_pt: O artigo aborda a demissão do Primeiro-Ministro do Senegal, Ousmane Sonko, pelo Presidente Bassirou Diomaye Faye, examinando seu retorno à oposição e sua candidatura à presidência da Assembleia Nacional. Foca nas manobras políticas e nas dinâmicas pessoais entre os dois líderes dentro do sistema democrático pós-colonial do Senegal.
summary_fr: L'article couvre le limogeage du Premier ministre sénégalais Ousmane Sonko par le président Bassirou Diomaye Faye, examinant son retour dans l'opposition et sa candidature à la présidence de l'Assemblée nationale. Il se concentre sur les manœuvres politiques et les dynamiques personnelles entre les deux dirigeants au sein du système démocratique post-colonial du Sénégal.
title: PoliticsSacked Senegal prime minister Ousmane Sonko returns to being the oppositionDismissed by President Faye, who he helped install, the charismatic PASTEF leader embraces his familiar martyr persona as he seeks the influential role of parliamentary speaker.

narrative_analysis: African citizens are shown as passive recipients of imported surveillance technology, their civil liberties subordinated to state security and corporate profit.
cui_bono: Huawei and ZTE benefit most from selling the surveillance systems.
summary: The article reports on the expansion of Chinese facial recognition and AI surveillance technology into African cities, led by firms Huawei and ZTE. It raises concerns about political monitoring, data control, and the erosion of privacy rights across the continent.
title_en: Facial recognition, AI-driven surveillance: How China is exporting its toolkit to Africa
title_es: Reconocimiento facial, vigilancia impulsada por IA: Cómo China exporta su kit de herramientas a África
title_pt: Reconhecimento facial, vigilância baseada em IA: Como a China está exportando seu kit de ferramentas para a África
title_fr: Reconnaissance faciale, surveillance pilotée par l'IA : Comment la Chine exporte sa panoplie vers l'Afrique
summary_es: El artículo informa sobre la expansión de la tecnología de vigilancia facial y de IA china en ciudades africanas, liderada por Huawei y ZTE, y plantea preocupaciones sobre el control de datos y la privacidad.
summary_pt: O artigo relata a expansão da tecnologia de vigilância facial e de IA chinesa em cidades africanas, liderada pela Huawei e ZTE, levantando preocupações sobre controle de dados e privacidade.
summary_fr: L'article relate l'expansion de la technologie chinoise de surveillance faciale et d'IA dans les villes africaines, menée par Huawei et ZTE, suscitant des inquiétudes sur le contrôle des données et la vie privée.
title: PoliticsFacial recognition, AI-driven surveillance: How China is exporting its toolkit to AfricaComplex technological architecture popularised by Huawei and ZTE is rapidly spreading across African cities, raising growing concerns about political monitoring, data control and the boundaries of state security.

narrative_analysis: Congolese footballers are presented as a health risk to be managed, reducing them to vectors of disease rather than athletes.
cui_bono: U.S. immigration and health authorities.
summary: The article notes that the United States is allowing the Democratic Republic of Congo's national football team to enter for the World Cup despite an ongoing Ebola outbreak in the DRC. The framing juxtaposes a health crisis with the athletes' arrival, implying a potential threat.
title_en: Despite Ebola outbreak, US welcomes DRC’s footballers for the World Cup
title_es: A pesar del brote de ébola, EE. UU. recibe a los futbolistas de la RDC para la Copa del Mundo
title_pt: Apesar do surto de Ebola, EUA recebem jogadores de futebol da RDC para a Copa do Mundo
title_fr: Malgré l'épidémie d'Ebola, les États-Unis accueillent les footballeurs de la RDC pour la Coupe du monde
summary_es: El artículo señala que Estados Unidos permite la entrada de la selección de fútbol de la República Democrática del Congo para la Copa del Mundo a pesar de un brote de ébola en curso. La narrativa yuxtapone una crisis sanitaria con la llegada de los atletas, sugiriendo una amenaza potencial.
summary_pt: O artigo observa que os Estados Unidos estão permitindo a entrada da seleção de futebol da República Democrática do Congo para a Copa do Mundo apesar de um surto de Ebola em andamento. A narrativa justapõe uma crise de saúde com a chegada dos atletas, sugerindo uma ameaça potencial.
summary_fr: L'article note que les États-Unis autorisent l'équipe de football de la République démocratique du Congo à entrer pour la Coupe du monde malgré une épidémie d'Ebola en cours. La narration juxtapose une crise sanitaire avec l'arrivée des athlètes, suggérant une menace potentielle.
title: Despite Ebola outbreak, US welcomes DRC’s footballers for the World Cup

narrative_analysis: The article portrays African economies as passive arenas for external profit, implying Black communities are perpetually vulnerable to neocolonial financial exploitation.
cui_bono: Western investors and multinational corporations.
summary: The article argues that the narrative of a booming African investment return is misleading, masking continued economic dependency and exploitation. It highlights how structural inequalities and colonial legacies leave African nations vulnerable to volatile global capital.
title_en: The illusion of the great African investment comeback
title_es: La ilusión del gran regreso de la inversión africana
title_pt: A ilusão do grande retorno do investimento africano
title_fr: L'illusion du grand retour de l'investissement africain
summary_es: El artículo sostiene que la narrativa de un auge en la inversión africana es engañosa, ocultando la dependencia y explotación económicas continuas.
summary_pt: O artigo argumenta que a narrativa de um boom de investimento africano é enganosa, mascarando dependência e exploração econômicas contínuas.
summary_fr: L'article soutient que le récit d'un boom des investissements africains est trompeur, masquant une dépendance et une exploitation économiques continues.
title: The illusion of the great African investment comeback

narrative_analysis: Black communities in the Global South are depicted as collectively endangered by a rush for energy resources that prioritizes geopolitical strategy over their economic and environmental well-being.
cui_bono: Global energy corporations and powerful nations benefiting from rapid resource extraction.
summary: The article argues that geopolitical panic risks derailing a 'just transition' to clean energy that prioritizes equity for developing nations, especially in Africa. It warns that wealthy countries and corporations may exploit energy crises to bypass climate justice and perpetuate colonial patterns of extraction and inequality.
title_en: Don’t let geopolitical panic kill the ‘just transition’
title_es: No dejes que el pánico geopolítico mate la ‘transición justa’
title_pt: Não deixe que o pânico geopolítico mate a ‘transição justa’
title_fr: Ne laissez pas la panique géopolitique tuer la « transition juste »
summary_es: El artículo sostiene que el pánico geopolítico amenaza con descarrilar una transición energética justa que priorice la equidad para las naciones en desarrollo, especialmente en África. Advierte que los países ricos y las corporaciones podrían explotar las crisis energéticas para eludir la justicia climática y perpetuar patrones coloniales de extracción y desigualdad.
summary_pt: O artigo argumenta que o pânico geopolítico ameaça prejudicar uma 'transição justa' para a energia limpa que prioriza a equidade para as nações em desenvolvimento, especialmente na África. Alerta que países ricos e corporações podem explorar crises energéticas para driblar a justiça climática e perpetuar padrões coloniais de extração e desigualdade.
summary_fr: L'article soutient que la panique géopolitique risque de faire dérailler une « transition juste » vers une énergie propre qui privilégie l'équité pour les pays en développement, notamment en Afrique. Il prévient que les pays riches et les entreprises pourraient exploiter les crises énergétiques pour contourner la justice climatique et perpétuer des schémas coloniaux d'extraction et d'inégalité.
title: Don’t let geopolitical panic kill the ‘just transition’

narrative_analysis: Young Black men in Kinshasa are depicted as violent enforcers and lawless street fighters, reinforcing stereotypes of African youth as dangerous and uncontrolled.
cui_bono: Félix Tshisekedi and his ruling party benefit from this intimidation.
summary: The article reports on accusations that the informal youth wing of President Tshisekedi's party operates as a brutal militia in Kinshasa, ahead of potential constitutional changes for the 2028 elections. It highlights their role in political intimidation and violence.
title_en: DRC: Félix Tshisekedi’s street fighters rule the roost in Kinshasa
title_es: RDC: Los luchadores callejeros de Félix Tshisekedi dominan Kinshasa
title_pt: RDC: Os lutadores de rua de Félix Tshisekedi dominam Kinshasa
title_fr: RDC : Les combattants de rue de Félix Tshisekedi règnent en maîtres à Kinshasa
summary_es: El artículo informa sobre acusaciones de que el ala juvenil informal del partido del presidente Tshisekedi opera como una milicia brutal en Kinshasa, antes de posibles cambios constitucionales para las elecciones de 2028. Destaca su papel en la intimidación y la violencia políticas.
summary_pt: O artigo relata acusações de que a ala juvenil informal do partido do presidente Tshisekedi opera como uma milícia brutal em Kinshasa, antes de possíveis mudanças constitucionais para as eleições de 2028. Destaca seu papel na intimidação e violência políticas.
summary_fr: L'article rapporte des accusations selon lesquelles l'aile jeunesse informelle du parti du président Tshisekedi agirait comme une milice brutale à Kinshasa, avant d'éventuels changements constitutionnels pour les élections de 2028. Il met en lumière leur rôle dans l'intimidation et la violence politiques.
title:
The Big Read.DRC: Félix Tshisekedi’s street fighters rule the roost in KinshasaAs the DRC braces for potential constitutional changes ahead of the 2028 elections, an informal youth wing of the ruling party faces growing accusations of acting as a brutal, lawless militia.By
            Socrate Nsimba

narrative_analysis: Portrayed as embroiled in a personal and political feud, the story treats Black elites as complex individuals rather than statistics.
cui_bono: The ruling Obiang family itself.
title_en: The sex tape scandal splitting Equatorial Guinea’s ruling family apart
summary: A leaked sex tape has caused a rift within Equatorial Guinea's ruling Obiang family, pitting the president's son against his nephew in a power struggle. The scandal highlights deep personal and political divisions among the country's elite.
title_es: El escándalo del video sexual que divide a la familia gobernante de Guinea Ecuatorial
title_pt: O escândalo do vídeo sexual que divide a família governante da Guiné Equatorial
title_fr: Le scandale de la sextape qui divise la famille régnante de Guinée équatoriale
summary_es: Un video sexual filtrado ha causado una ruptura dentro de la familia gobernante Obiang de Guinea Ecuatorial, enfrentando al hijo del presidente con su sobrino en una lucha de poder. El escándalo resalta profundas divisiones personales y políticas entre la élite del país.
summary_pt: Um vídeo sexual vazado causou uma ruptura na família governante Obiang da Guiné Equatorial, colocando o filho do presidente contra seu sobrinho em uma luta pelo poder. O escândalo destaca profundas divisões pessoais e políticas entre a elite do país.
summary_fr: Une sextape divulguée a provoqué une scission au sein de la famille dirigeante Obiang de Guinée équatoriale, opposant le fils du président à son neveu dans une lutte de pouvoir. Le scandale met en lumière de profondes divisions personnelles et politiques parmi l'élite du pays.
title: The sex tape scandal splitting Equatorial Guinea’s ruling family apart

narrative_analysis: The coverage humanizes President Paul Biya by focusing on his personal health crisis, yet it also reduces Black political agency to a passive succession drama.
cui_bono: The ruling CPDM party and its inner circle benefit most.
summary: The article discusses how President Paul Biya's health emergency has reignited fears and speculation about political succession in Cameroon. It explores the uncertainties surrounding the transfer of power in a country with a long-standing leader.
title_en: Paul Biya’s health emergency reignites Cameroon political succession fears
title_es: La emergencia de salud de Paul Biya reaviva los temores de sucesión política en Camerún
title_pt: Emergência de saúde de Paul Biya reacende temores de sucessão política nos Camarões
title_fr: L'urgence sanitaire de Paul Biya relance les craintes de succession politique au Cameroun
summary_es: El artículo analiza cómo la emergencia de salud del presidente Paul Biya ha reavivado los temores y especulaciones sobre la sucesión política en Camerún. Explora las incertidumbres en torno a la transferencia de poder en un país con un líder de larga data.
summary_pt: O artigo discute como a emergência de saúde do presidente Paul Biya reacendeu os temores e especulações sobre a sucessão política nos Camarões. Explora as incertezas em torno da transferência de poder em um país com um líder de longa data.
summary_fr: L'article examine comment l'urgence sanitaire du président Paul Biya a relancé les craintes et les spéculations sur la succession politique au Cameroun. Il explore les incertitudes entourant le transfert de pouvoir dans un pays dirigé par un leader de longue date.
title: Paul Biya’s health emergency reignites Cameroon political succession fears

narrative_analysis: Africans are reduced to a health security threat in a travel ban debate, implying their lives matter less than Western safety.
cui_bono: The Trump administration benefits politically by appearing tough on immigration.
summary: The article discusses how the Trump administration used the threat of Ebola to defend travel restrictions, framing the issue as a security matter. Black communities in Africa are portrayed mainly as vectors of disease, reinforcing stereotypes of the continent as a source of danger.
title_en: US-Africa Week Ahead: Trump plays travel-ban defence on Ebola
title_es: Semana EE.UU.-África: Trump defiende la prohibición de viajes por el ébola
title_pt: Semana EUA-África: Trump defende proibição de viagens pelo Ebola
title_fr: Semaine USA-Afrique : Trump défend l'interdiction de voyage sur l'Ebola
summary_es: El artículo explica cómo la administración Trump utilizó la amenaza del ébola para justificar restricciones de viaje, presentando el tema como un problema de seguridad. Las comunidades negras en África son retratadas principalmente como vectores de enfermedad, reforzando estereotipos del continente como fuente de peligro.
summary_pt: O artigo discute como a administração Trump usou a ameaça do Ebola para defender restrições de viagem, enquadrando a questão como de segurança. As comunidades negras na África são retratadas principalmente como vetores de doença, reforçando estereótipos do continente como fonte de perigo.
summary_fr: L'article explique comment l'administration Trump a utilisé la menace d'Ebola pour justifier les restrictions de voyage, présentant la question comme un problème de sécurité. Les communautés noires en Afrique sont dépeintes principalement comme des vecteurs de maladie, renforçant les stéréotypes du continent comme source de danger.
title: US-Africa Week Ahead: Trump plays travel-ban defence on Ebola

narrative_analysis: Nigerians are portrayed as losing democratic memory and civic engagement, implying they are passive victims of systemic political erosion and elite capture.
cui_bono: Nigeria's political elite and ruling class.
summary: The article argues that Nigeria's democratic memory is fading due to disillusionment, poor governance, and historical trauma. It warns that this loss of collective memory threatens democratic accountability and stability.
title_en: Nigeria’s democratic memory is fading – and that should worry us
title_es: La memoria democrática de Nigeria se desvanece – y eso debería preocuparnos
title_pt: A memória democrática da Nigéria está se apagando – e isso deveria nos preocupar
title_fr: La mémoire démocratique du Nigeria s'efface – et cela devrait nous inquiéter
summary_es: El artículo sostiene que la memoria democrática de Nigeria se está desvaneciendo debido a la desilusión, la mala gobernanza y el trauma histórico. Advierte que esta pérdida de memoria colectiva amenaza la rendición de cuentas y la estabilidad democrática.
summary_pt: O artigo argumenta que a memória democrática da Nigéria está desaparecendo devido ao desencanto, à má governança e ao trauma histórico. Adverte que essa perda de memória coletiva ameaça a responsabilidade democrática e a estabilidade.
summary_fr: L'article soutient que la mémoire démocratique du Nigeria s'estompe en raison du désenchantement, de la mauvaise gouvernance et du traumatisme historique. Il avertit que cette perte de mémoire collective menace la responsabilité et la stabilité démocratiques.
title: Nigeria’s democratic memory is fading – and that should worry us

narrative_analysis: The coverage turns Congolese lives into a backdrop for conflict statistics, stripping away their humanity and agency amid ongoing violence and disease.
cui_bono: Armed groups and foreign extractive corporations benefiting from instability.
summary: The article reports that an Ebola outbreak in eastern DRC has not stopped ongoing fierce fighting between armed groups. It highlights how the twin crises of conflict and disease continue to destabilize the region, with little attention to the civilian toll.
title_en: Ebola outbreak fails to halt fierce fighting in eastern DRC
title_es: Brote de ébola no logra detener los feroces combates en el este de la RDC
title_pt: Surto de ebola não consegue interromper os combates ferozes no leste da RDC
title_fr: L'épidémie d'Ebola ne parvient pas à arrêter les violents combats dans l'est de la RDC
summary_es: El artículo informa que un brote de ébola en el este de la RDC no ha detenido los continuos y feroces combates entre grupos armados. Destaca cómo la doble crisis de conflicto y enfermedad continúa desestabilizando la región, con poca atención al costo civil.
summary_pt: O artigo relata que um surto de ebola no leste da RDC não interrompeu os combates ferozes entre grupos armados. Destaca como a dupla crise de conflito e doença continua a desestabilizar a região, com pouca atenção ao custo civil.
summary_fr: L'article rapporte qu'une épidémie d'Ebola dans l'est de la RDC n'a pas arrêté les violents combats entre groupes armés. Il souligne comment la double crise du conflit et de la maladie continue de déstabiliser la région, avec peu d'attention au bilan civil.
title: Ebola outbreak fails to halt fierce fighting in eastern DRC

narrative_analysis: Black South Africans are portrayed as entwined in corruption and drug crime, reinforcing stereotypes of criminality within the police force and business elite.
cui_bono: Organized crime networks and corrupt officials benefit most.
summary: The Madlanga Commission in South Africa investigates allegations of police corruption, including ties to drug cartels and contract kickbacks. Witnesses have testified about romantic relationships with suspects and botched drug raids, while the public follows the inquiry like a crime drama.
title_en: 'Gifts' from a lover and 'botched' cocaine raids: Police inquiry grips South Africa
title_es: 'Regalos' de un amante y redadas de cocaína 'fallidas': La investigación policial cautiva a Sudáfrica
title_pt: 'Presentes' de um amante e batidas de cocaína 'malsucedidas': Investigação policial domina a África do Sul
title_fr: 'Cadeaux' d'un amant et raids de cocaïne 'ratés' : L'enquête policière captive l'Afrique du Sud
summary_es: La Comisión Madlanga en Sudáfrica investiga acusaciones de corrupción policial, incluidos vínculos con cárteles de drogas y sobornos. Testigos han declarado sobre relaciones románticas con sospechosos y redadas fallidas, mientras el público sigue la investigación como un drama criminal.
summary_pt: A Comissão Madlanga na África do Sul investiga alegações de corrupção policial, incluindo vínculos com cartéis de drogas e propinas. Testemunhas depuseram sobre relacionamentos românticos com suspeitos e batidas fracassadas, enquanto o público acompanha a investigação como um drama criminal.
summary_fr: La Commission Madlanga en Afrique du Sud enquête sur des allégations de corruption policière, y compris des liens avec des cartels de drogue et des pots-de-vin. Des témoins ont déposé sur des relations amoureuses avec des suspects et des raids ratés, tandis que le public suit l'enquête comme un drame criminel.
title: 'Gifts' from a lover and 'botched' cocaine raids: Police inquiry grips South AfricaSouth Africa's Madlanga Commission hears about Brazilian butt lift bribe denials and alleged drug heists.13 hrs agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: The story portrays LGBTQ+ Black Ghanaians as victims of state and religious persecution, with the law framing them as threats to cultural values and morality.
cui_bono: Conservative evangelical and Muslim religious leaders.
summary: Ghana's parliament passed a bill criminalizing LGBTQ+ identity and allyship, with penalties up to three years in prison. The legislation, pressured by religious leaders, updates colonial-era laws and has drawn international criticism.
title_en: Ghana's parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ bill
title_es: El parlamento de Ghana aprueba un proyecto de ley contra LGBTQ+
title_pt: Parlamento de Gana aprova projeto de lei anti-LGBTQ+
title_fr: Le parlement du Ghana adopte un projet de loi anti-LGBTQ+
summary_es: El parlamento de Ghana aprobó un proyecto de ley que criminaliza la identidad LGBTQ+ y la defensa de sus derechos, con penas de hasta tres años de prisión.
summary_pt: O parlamento de Gana aprovou um projeto de lei que criminaliza a identidade LGBTQ+ e o ativismo, com penas de até três anos de prisão.
summary_fr: Le parlement du Ghana a adopté un projet de loi criminalisant l'identité LGBTQ+ et le militantisme, avec des peines allant jusqu'à trois ans de prison.
title: Ghana's parliament passes anti-LGBTQ+ billSame-sex acts are punishable by jail terms under Ghana's new bill targeting those identifying as gay, lesbian or transgender.15 hrs agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: Students are reduced to casualty numbers and safety failures are questioned, yet the systemic neglect of Black Kenyan children's lives remains unaddressed.
cui_bono: Unclear.
summary: A fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Kenya killed 16 students and injured 79, sparking concerns over boarding school safety. Parents criticized the lack of preparedness and safety standards, but the story focuses on immediate tragedy rather than systemic underfunding or colonial-era infrastructure.
title_en: Questions over safety as 16 pupils die in another Kenya school fire
title_es: Preguntas sobre la seguridad mientras 16 alumnas mueren en otro incendio escolar en Kenia
title_pt: Questões sobre segurança enquanto 16 alunas morrem em outro incêndio escolar no Quênia
title_fr: Questions sur la sécurité alors que 16 élèves meurent dans un autre incendie scolaire au Kenya
summary_es: Un incendio en la Utumishi Girls Academy en Kenia mató a 16 estudiantes e hirió a 79, generando preocupaciones sobre la seguridad en internados. Los padres criticaron la falta de preparación y estándares de seguridad, pero la historia se centra en la tragedia inmediata en lugar de la falta de financiamiento sistémico o infraestructura colonial.
summary_pt: Um incêndio na Utumishi Girls Academy no Quênia matou 16 estudantes e feriu 79, gerando preocupações sobre a segurança em internatos. Os pais criticaram a falta de preparação e padrões de segurança, mas a história foca na tragédia imediata em vez do subfinanciamento sistêmico ou infraestrutura colonial.
summary_fr: Un incendie à l'Utumishi Girls Academy au Kenya a tué 16 élèves et blessé 79, suscitant des inquiétudes sur la sécurité des internats. Les parents ont critiqué le manque de préparation et de normes de sécurité, mais l'histoire se concentre sur la tragédie immédiate plutôt que sur le sous-financement systémique ou l'infrastructure coloniale.
title: Questions over safety as 16 pupils die in another Kenya school fireSeveral parents were still waiting for news of their children roughly 12 hours after the fire.2 days agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: Black communities in DR Congo are shown as passive victims of a dual catastrophe—Ebola and conflict—with little agency beyond awaiting external aid.
cui_bono: Armed groups and international pharmaceutical corporations benefit from instability and outbreak conditions.
summary: The WHO warns that conflict in DR Congo's Ituri province is crippling the Ebola response, with attacks on health workers and mass displacement worsening the outbreak. A rare strain of Ebola has caused 220 suspected deaths, and travel restrictions from Uganda, Canada, and the US further isolate the region.
title_en: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
title_es: La RDC afectada por el ébola enfrenta una 'colisión catastrófica' de enfermedad y conflicto, advierte la OMS
title_pt: RDC atingida pelo Ebola enfrenta 'colisão catastrófica' de doença e conflito, alerta OMS
title_fr: La RDC touchée par Ebola fait face à une 'collision catastrophique' de maladie et de conflit, prévient l'OMS
summary_es: La OMS advierte que el conflicto en la provincia de Ituri en RDC está paralizando la respuesta al ébola, con ataques a trabajadores sanitarios y desplazamientos masivos que empeoran el brote. Una cepa rara de ébola ha causado 220 muertes sospechosas, y las restricciones de viaje de Uganda, Canadá y EE.UU. aíslan aún más la región.
summary_pt: A OMS alerta que o conflito na província de Ituri na RDC está paralisando a resposta ao Ebola, com ataques a trabalhadores de saúde e deslocamentos em massa agravando o surto. Uma cepa rara de Ebola causou 220 mortes suspeitas, e restrições de viagem de Uganda, Canadá e EUA isolam ainda mais a região.
summary_fr: L'OMS prévient que le conflit dans la province d'Ituri en RDC paralyse la réponse à Ebola, avec des attaques contre les travailleurs de santé et des déplacements massifs aggravant l'épidémie. Une souche rare d'Ebola a causé 220 décès suspects, et les restrictions de voyage de l'Ouganda, du Canada et des États-Unis isolent davantage la région.
title: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warnsTedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said fighting in DR Congo was hampering efforts to stop spread3 days agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: The coverage focuses on the eight arrested students as perpetrators, deflecting attention from systemic overcrowding and locked exits that endangered Black girls.
cui_bono: The Kenyan government benefits by shifting blame onto students.
summary: Eight students have been arrested in Kenya for a suspected arson attack at Utumishi Girls Academy that killed 16 pupils. The education minister cited safety breaches like overcrowding and a locked exit door, and dissolved the school's board.
title_en: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
title_es: Ocho estudiantes arrestados en Kenia tras presunto ataque incendiario mortal en una escuela
title_pt: Oito estudantes presos no Quênia após suspeita de ataque incendiário mortal em escola
title_fr: Huit étudiants arrêtés au Kenya après une attaque incendiaire mortelle présumée dans une école
summary_es: Ocho estudiantes han sido arrestados en Kenia por un presunto ataque incendiario en la Academia Utumishi Girls que mató a 16 alumnas. El ministro de educación señaló violaciones de seguridad como hacinamiento y una puerta de salida cerrada, y disolvió la junta escolar.
summary_pt: Oito estudantes foram presos no Quênia por um suposto ataque incendiário na Utumishi Girls Academy que matou 16 alunas. O ministro da educação citou violações de segurança como superlotação e uma porta de saída trancada, e dissolveu o conselho escolar.
summary_fr: Huit étudiants ont été arrêtés au Kenya pour une présumée attaque incendiaire à l'Utumishi Girls Academy qui a tué 16 élèves. Le ministre de l'éducation a cité des manquements à la sécurité comme le surpeuplement et une porte de sortie verrouillée, et a dissous le conseil scolaire.
title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attackSixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.1 day agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: Black Kenyans are portrayed as passive subjects whose health sovereignty is overridden by a US facility designed to protect Americans, reinforcing colonial extraction patterns.
cui_bono: US government and its citizens.
summary: A Kenyan court halted a US-planned Ebola quarantine facility for American citizens, citing public health risks. The decision followed local opposition and concerns about sovereignty and infection spread.
title_en: Kenya court halts opening of US Ebola quarantine facility in the country
title_es: Tribunal de Kenia suspende la apertura de un centro de cuarentena de ébola de EE.UU. en el país
title_pt: Tribunal do Quênia suspende abertura de centro de quarentena de ebola dos EUA no país
title_fr: Un tribunal kenyan suspend l'ouverture d'un centre de quarantaine Ebola américain dans le pays
summary_es: Un tribunal keniano suspendió un centro de cuarentena de ébola planeado por EE.UU. para ciudadanos estadounidenses, citando riesgos para la salud pública. La decisión siguió a la oposición local y preocupaciones sobre soberanía y propagación de infecciones.
summary_pt: Um tribunal queniano suspendeu um centro de quarentena de ebola planejado pelos EUA para cidadãos americanos, citando riscos à saúde pública. A decisão seguiu a oposição local e preocupações sobre soberania e propagação de infecções.
summary_fr: Un tribunal kenyan a suspendu un centre de quarantaine Ebola prévu par les États-Unis pour les citoyens américains, invoquant des risques pour la santé publique. La décision a suivi l'opposition locale et les inquiétudes concernant la souveraineté et la propagation des infections.
title: Kenya court halts opening of US Ebola quarantine facility in the countryA 50-bed isolation unit in Kenya for US citizens was due to open on Friday, a US official said.1 day agoAfrica

narrative_analysis: The people in this story are portrayed as helpless victims of a deadly virus and systemic neglect, their deaths and fears reduced to a backdrop of institutional failure.
cui_bono: Gold mining corporations benefit from lax health monitoring in remote towns.
summary: An Ebola outbreak in eastern DR Congo spreads undetected due to weak health surveillance and community mistrust, causing hundreds of suspected cases and deaths. Health officials struggle to catch up, while residents express fear and a need for protective measures.
title_en: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
title_es: 'El ébola nos ha torturado': El miedo se apodera del este de la República Democrática del Congo mientras se propaga el virus mortal
title_pt: 'O Ebola nos torturou': Medo toma conta do leste da RD Congo enquanto vírus mortal se espalha
title_fr: 'Ebola nous a torturés' : La peur s'empare de l'est de la RD Congo alors que le virus mortel se propage
summary_es: Un brote de ébola en el este de la República Democrática del Congo se propaga sin ser detectado debido a la débil vigilancia sanitaria y la desconfianza comunitaria, causando cientos de casos sospechosos y muertes. Los funcionarios de salud luchan por ponerse al día, mientras los residentes expresan miedo y necesidad de medidas de protección.
summary_pt: Um surto de Ebola no leste da RD Congo se espalha sem detecção devido à fraca vigilância sanitária e desconfiança comunitária, causando centenas de casos suspeitos e mortes. Autoridades de saúde lutam para acompanhar, enquanto moradores expressam medo e necessidade de medidas de proteção.
summary_fr: Une épidémie d'Ebola dans l'est de la RD Congo se propage sans être détectée en raison d'une faible surveillance sanitaire et de la méfiance communautaire, causant des centaines de cas suspects et de décès. Les responsables de la santé peinent à rattraper leur retard, tandis que les habitants expriment leur peur et leur besoin de mesures de protection.
title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreadsThe health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.

narrative_analysis: The story humanizes Black African communities through personal testimony, but it subtly centers Western expertise while framing local beliefs as obstacles to overcome.
cui_bono: Global health institutions like the WHO and international pharmaceutical companies.
summary: The article recounts the experiences of Ebola survivor Patrick Faley and other experts from West Africa's 2014 outbreak, drawing lessons for the current epidemic in DR Congo. It highlights the tension between public health measures and community practices, emphasizing speed, trust, and culturally sensitive engagement.
title_en: 'Speed, money and compassion' - lessons from an Ebola survivor and other experts
title_es: 'Velocidad, dinero y compasión': lecciones de un sobreviviente del ébola y otros expertos
title_pt: 'Velocidade, dinheiro e compaixão' - lições de um sobrevivente do Ebola e outros especialistas
title_fr: 'Vitesse, argent et compassion' - leçons d'un survivant d'Ebola et d'autres experts
summary_es: El artículo relata las experiencias de Patrick Faley, sobreviviente del ébola, y otros expertos del brote de 2014 en África Occidental, extrayendo lecciones para la epidemia actual en la RDC. Destaca la tensión entre las medidas de salud pública y las prácticas comunitarias, subrayando la velocidad, la confianza y el compromiso culturalmente sensible.
summary_pt: O artigo relata as experiências de Patrick Faley, sobrevivente do Ebola, e outros especialistas do surto de 2014 na África Ocidental, extraindo lições para a epidemia atual na RDC. Destaca a tensão entre medidas de saúde pública e práticas comunitárias, enfatizando velocidade, confiança e engajamento culturalmente sensível.
summary_fr: L'article relate les expériences de Patrick Faley, survivant d'Ebola, et d'autres experts de l'épidémie de 2014 en Afrique de l'Ouest, tirant des leçons pour l'épidémie actuelle en RDC. Il souligne la tension entre les mesures de santé publique et les pratiques communautaires, mettant l'accent sur la rapidité, la confiance et l'engagement culturellement sensible.
title: 'Speed, money and compassion' - lessons from an Ebola survivor and other expertsThose caught up in West Africa's Ebola outbreak a decade ago on how best to tackle the current epidemic.

narrative_analysis: The outbreak is presented through clinical and epidemiological data, minimizing the lived realities of Congolese communities as victims of both disease and conflict.
cui_bono: The global health industry and pharmaceutical companies developing experimental treatments.
summary: The article details the challenges of containing an Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, caused by a rare species with no vaccine and set in a conflict zone. It focuses on health logistics and statistics, but provides little context on the structural inequalities shaping the crisis.
title_en: What is Ebola and why is stopping the latest outbreak so difficult?
title_es: ¿Qué es el ébola y por qué es tan difícil detener el último brote?
title_pt: O que é o Ebola e por que é tão difícil conter o último surto?
title_fr: Qu'est-ce qu'Ebola et pourquoi est-il si difficile d'arrêter la dernière épidémie ?
summary_es: El artículo detalla los desafíos de contener un brote de ébola en la República Democrática del Congo, causado por una especie rara sin vacuna y en una zona de conflicto. Se centra en la logística sanitaria y las estadísticas, pero ofrece poco contexto sobre las desigualdades estructurales.
summary_pt: O artigo detalha os desafios de conter um surto de Ebola na República Democrática do Congo, causado por uma espécie rara sem vacina e em uma zona de conflito. Foca na logística de saúde e estatísticas, mas oferece pouco contexto sobre as desigualdades estruturais.
summary_fr: L'article détaille les défis de la lutte contre une épidémie d'Ebola en RDC, causée par une espèce rare sans vaccin et située dans une zone de conflit. Il se concentre sur la logistique sanitaire et les statistiques, mais offre peu de contexte sur les inégalités structurelles.
title: What is Ebola and why is stopping the latest outbreak so difficult?An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare species of the virus and is in an area affected by conflict.

narrative_analysis: The indigenous Sahrawi people are portrayed as a backdrop to tourism development, their right to self-determination overshadowed by foreign investment and occupation.
cui_bono: Moroccan government and tourism industry benefit most.
summary: Morocco is promoting tourism in Western Sahara, a disputed territory under UN classification, while rights groups say this legitimizes occupation. Tourist numbers have surged due to expanded airline routes and government investment, despite local Sahrawi people never having a vote on their future.
title_en: Morocco wants tourists to visit Western Sahara. Some say it's tightening its control
title_es: Marruecos quiere turistas en el Sáhara Occidental. Algunos dicen que refuerza su control
title_pt: Marrocos quer turistas no Saara Ocidental. Alguns dizem que está a reforçar o seu controlo
title_fr: Le Maroc veut des touristes au Sahara occidental. Certains disent qu'il renforce son contrôle
summary_es: Marruecos promueve el turismo en el Sáhara Occidental, territorio en disputa bajo clasificación de la ONU, mientras grupos de derechos humanos dicen que esto legitima la ocupación. El número de turistas ha aumentado debido a nuevas rutas aéreas e inversión gubernamental, pese a que los saharauis nunca han votado sobre su futuro.
summary_pt: Marrocos promove turismo no Saara Ocidental, território disputado sob classificação da ONU, enquanto grupos de direitos humanos afirmam que isso legitima a ocupação. O número de turistas aumentou devido a novas rotas aéreas e investimento governamental, apesar de os saharauis nunca terem votado sobre o seu futuro.
summary_fr: Le Maroc fait la promotion du tourisme au Sahara occidental, territoire contesté sous classification onusienne, tandis que des groupes de défense des droits estiment que cela légitime l'occupation. Le nombre de touristes a augmenté grâce à de nouvelles routes aériennes et à l'investissement gouvernemental, bien que les Sahraouis n'aient jamais voté sur leur avenir.
title: Morocco wants tourists to visit Western Sahara. Some say it's tightening its controlThe Moroccan government wants more Western holidaymakers to visit the territory it claims to own.

narrative_analysis: East African traders and consumers are shown locked into dependency on used clothes, their local industries undermined by cheap imports from wealthy nations.
cui_bono: Western and Chinese used-clothing exporters and fast-fashion supply chains.
summary: East African nations like Kenya, Uganda, and Tanzania struggle to curb imports of second-hand clothing from the West and China, which undercut local garment industries. Despite taxes and proposed bans, cheap mitumba remain popular, highlighting economic dependency and environmental concerns.
title_en: East Africa wants to curb imports of used clothes. But it's not easy
title_es: África Oriental quiere frenar las importaciones de ropa usada. Pero no es fácil
title_pt: África Oriental quer conter importações de roupas usadas. Mas não é fácil
title_fr: L'Afrique de l'Est veut freiner les importations de vêtements d'occasion. Mais ce n'est pas facile
summary_es: Países de África Oriental como Kenia, Uganda y Tanzania luchan por frenar las importaciones de ropa de segunda mano de Occidente y China, que perjudican a las industrias locales. A pesar de los impuestos y las prohibiciones propuestas, las baratas mitumba siguen siendo populares, lo que refleja dependencia económica y preocupaciones ambientales.
summary_pt: Países da África Oriental como Quênia, Uganda e Tanzânia lutam para conter importações de roupas usadas do Ocidente e da China, que prejudicam as indústrias locais. Apesar de impostos e proibições propostas, as baratas mitumba continuam populares, refletindo dependência econômica e preocupações ambientais.
summary_fr: Les pays d'Afrique de l'Est comme le Kenya, l'Ouganda et la Tanzanie peinent à freiner les importations de vêtements d'occasion de l'Occident et de la Chine, qui nuisent à leurs industries locales. Malgré les taxes et les interdictions proposées, les mitumba bon marché restent populaires, reflétant une dépendance économique et des préoccupations environnementales.
title: East Africa wants to curb imports of used clothes. But it's not easyKenya, Uganda and Tanzania are major importers of used garments from the West and China.

narrative_analysis: The coverage reduces the outbreak to case counts and death tolls, rendering affected Congolese communities as passive data points in a global health narrative.
cui_bono: Pharmaceutical companies and research institutions gain from vaccine development and trials.
summary: Scientists at Oxford University are developing an experimental Ebola vaccine targeting the Bundibugyo strain, with trials possible in two to three months. The outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has led to 750 suspected cases and 177 deaths, and the WHO has raised the risk level to 'very high.'
title_en: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
title_es: Científicos del Reino Unido desarrollan vacuna contra el ébola que podría estar lista para ensayos en meses
title_pt: Cientistas do Reino Unido desenvolvem vacina contra o Ebola que pode estar pronta para testes em meses
title_fr: Des scientifiques britanniques développent un vaccin contre Ebola qui pourrait être prêt pour des essais dans quelques mois
summary_es: Científicos de la Universidad de Oxford están desarrollando una vacuna experimental contra el ébola dirigida a la cepa Bundibugyo, con ensayos posibles en dos o tres meses. El brote en la República Democrática del Congo ha causado 750 casos sospechosos y 177 muertes, y la OMS ha elevado el nivel de riesgo a 'muy alto'.
summary_pt: Cientistas da Universidade de Oxford estão desenvolvendo uma vacina experimental contra o Ebola visando a cepa Bundibugyo, com testes possíveis em dois a três meses. O surto na República Democrática do Congo resultou em 750 casos suspeitos e 177 mortes, e a OMS elevou o nível de risco para 'muito alto'.
summary_fr: Des scientifiques de l'Université d'Oxford développent un vaccin expérimental contre Ebola ciblant la souche Bundibugyo, avec des essais possibles dans deux à trois mois. L'épidémie en République démocratique du Congo a fait 750 cas suspects et 177 morts, et l'OMS a relevé le niveau de risque à « très élevé ».
title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in monthsThe rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

narrative_analysis: This story presents Fatima Bio as a resilient individual overcoming personal adversity, while subtly implying that her social housing tenancy is controversial rather than a right.
cui_bono: The Bio family's political capital benefits from this humanizing narrative.
summary: The BBC profiles Sierra Leone's first lady Fatima Bio, highlighting her escape from child marriage to become a vocal advocate against it. The story also covers criticism over her retention of a council flat in London while living in a presidential mansion.
title_en: From escaping child marriage 'to an old pervert' to becoming Sierra Leone's first lady
title_es: De escapar del matrimonio infantil 'con un viejo pervertido' a convertirse en la primera dama de Sierra Leona
title_pt: De escapar do casamento infantil 'com um velho pervertido' a se tornar a primeira-dama de Serra Leoa
title_fr: De l'évasion du mariage d'enfant 'avec un vieux pervers' à devenir la première dame de Sierra Leone
summary_es: La BBC perfila a la primera dama de Sierra Leona, Fatima Bio, destacando su escape del matrimonio infantil para convertirse en una defensora vocal contra él. La historia también cubre las críticas por mantener un piso de alquiler social en Londres mientras vive en una mansión presidencial.
summary_pt: A BBC traça o perfil da primeira-dama de Serra Leoa, Fatima Bio, destacando sua fuga do casamento infantil para se tornar uma defensora vocal contra ele. A história também cobre críticas por manter um apartamento social em Londres enquanto vive em uma mansão presidencial.
summary_fr: La BBC dresse le portrait de la première dame de Sierra Leone, Fatima Bio, mettant en lumière son évasion du mariage d'enfant pour devenir une ardente défenseure contre cette pratique. L'histoire couvre également les critiques sur le fait qu'elle conserve un logement social à Londres tout en vivant dans une demeure présidentielle.
title: From escaping child marriage 'to an old pervert' to becoming Sierra Leone's first ladyThe private world of one of Africa's most powerful political women is revealed in a BBC World Service exclusive.

narrative_analysis: The outbreak is reduced to case counts and fatality rates, stripping Congolese communities of context and treating them as passive vectors of disease.
cui_bono: Global pharmaceutical companies gain from experimental vaccine and drug trials.
summary: The BBC reports on a new Ebola outbreak in DR Congo caused by the rare Bundibugyo species, with nearly 250 suspected cases and 80 deaths. The article emphasizes the lack of approved vaccines and treatments, the challenges of civil war, and the threat to neighboring countries, but frames the crisis primarily through epidemiological data.
title_en: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
title_es: ¿Qué tan preocupante es el brote de ébola en la República Democrática del Congo?
title_pt: Quão preocupante é o surto de Ebola na República Democrática do Congo?
title_fr: À quel point l'épidémie d'Ebola en République démocratique du Congo est-elle préoccupante?
summary_es: La BBC informa sobre un nuevo brote de ébola en la RDC causado por la rara especie Bundibugyo, con casi 250 casos sospechosos y 80 muertes. El artículo enfatiza la falta de vacunas y tratamientos aprobados, los desafíos de la guerra civil y la amenaza a los países vecinos, pero enmarca la crisis principalmente a través de datos epidemiológicos.
summary_pt: A BBC relata um novo surto de Ebola na RDC causado pela rara espécie Bundibugyo, com quase 250 casos suspeitos e 80 mortes. O artigo enfatiza a falta de vacinas e tratamentos aprovados, os desafios da guerra civil e a ameaça aos países vizinhos, mas enquadra a crise principalmente por meio de dados epidemiológicos.
summary_fr: La BBC fait état d'une nouvelle épidémie d'Ebola en RDC causée par la rare espèce Bundibugyo, avec près de 250 cas suspects et 80 décès. L'article souligne l'absence de vaccins et de traitements approuvés, les défis de la guerre civile et la menace pour les pays voisins, mais cadre la crise principalement à travers des données épidémiologiques.
title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

narrative_analysis: Black communities are absent from this headline list, reduced to global news snippets where their specific experiences remain invisible.
cui_bono: Unclear.
summary: This is a BBC World Service for Africa news page presenting a collection of video headlines on topics ranging from South Korean tattoo laws to a Blue Origin rocket mishap. The content does not focus on any specific story about Black communities or Africa.
title_en: Live: World Service for Africa
title_es: En vivo: Servicio Mundial para África
title_pt: Ao vivo: Serviço Mundial para a África
title_fr: En direct : Service mondial pour l'Afrique
summary_es: Esta es una página de noticias de BBC World Service for Africa que presenta una colección de titulares de video sobre temas que van desde las leyes de tatuajes en Corea del Sur hasta el accidente del cohete Blue Origin. El contenido no se centra en ninguna historia específica sobre comunidades negras o África.
summary_pt: Esta é uma página de notícias da BBC World Service for Africa apresentando uma coleção de manchetes de vídeo sobre tópicos que vão desde leis de tatuagem na Coreia do Sul até o acidente do foguete Blue Origin. O conteúdo não se concentra em nenhuma história específica sobre comunidades negras ou África.
