Le contenu ne se concentre sur aucune histoire spécifique concernant les communautés noires ou l'Afrique.
title: Live: World Service for Africa

narrative_analysis: Rwanda is depicted as a proactive, sovereign actor strategically pursuing nuclear partnerships, which reframes African nations as capable agents rather than passive victims.
cui_bono: Rosatom (Russian state nuclear agency) benefits most.
summary: Rwanda signs a nuclear cooperation agreement with Russia, aiming to advance technology, healthcare, and energy. The deal reflects Africa's shifting geopolitical alliances and growing skepticism toward Western partners.
title_en: Rwanda-Russia nuclear deal underscores Africa’s shifting power balance
title_es: Acuerdo nuclear entre Ruanda y Rusia subraya el cambio de equilibrio de poder en África
title_pt: Acordo nuclear entre Ruanda e Rússia destaca a mudança no equilíbrio de poder na África
title_fr: L'accord nucléaire Rwanda-Russie souligne l'évolution des rapports de force en Afrique
summary_es: Ruanda firma un acuerdo de cooperación nuclear con Rusia, con el objetivo de avanzar en tecnología, salud y energía. El acuerdo refleja los cambios en las alianzas geopolíticas de África y el creciente escepticismo hacia los socios occidentales.
summary_pt: Ruanda assina um acordo de cooperação nuclear com a Rússia, com o objetivo de avançar em tecnologia, saúde e energia. O acordo reflete as mudanças nas alianças geopolíticas da África e o crescente ceticismo em relação aos parceiros ocidentais.
summary_fr: Le Rwanda signe un accord de coopération nucléaire avec la Russie, visant à faire progresser la technologie, la santé et l'énergie. L'accord reflète l'évolution des alliances géopolitiques en Afrique et le scepticisme croissant envers les partenaires occidentaux.
title: Rwanda-Russia nuclear deal underscores Africa’s shifting power balance

narrative_analysis: The coverage focuses on the eight girls as suspects in a planned arson, framing them as perpetrators rather than victims of systemic neglect in school safety.
cui_bono: The Kenyan government avoids accountability for safety failures.
summary: A fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Kenya, killed 16 students and wounded 79. Police arrested eight girls on suspicion of arson, while officials cited overcrowding and a locked emergency exit as safety violations.
title_en: Eight girls arrested on suspicion of arson after Kenya school fire
title_es: Ocho niñas arrestadas bajo sospecha de incendio provocado tras incendio en escuela de Kenia
title_pt: Oito meninas presas sob suspeita de incêndio criminoso após incêndio em escola no Quênia
title_fr: Huit filles arrêtées pour suspicion d'incendie criminel après un incendie dans une école au Kenya
summary_es: Un incendio en Utumishi Girls Academy en Gilgil, Kenia, mató a 16 estudiantes e hirió a 79. La policía arrestó a ocho niñas bajo sospecha de incendio provocado, mientras que funcionarios citaron hacinamiento y una salida de emergencia cerrada como violaciones de seguridad.
summary_pt: Um incêndio na Utumishi Girls Academy em Gilgil, Quênia, matou 16 alunos e feriu 79. A polícia prendeu oito meninas sob suspeita de incêndio criminoso, enquanto autoridades citaram superlotação e uma saída de emergência trancada como violações de segurança.
summary_fr: Un incendie à l'Utumishi Girls Academy à Gilgil, au Kenya, a tué 16 élèves et blessé 79 autres. La police a arrêté huit filles pour suspicion d'incendie criminel, tandis que les autorités ont cité la surpopulation et une sortie de secours verrouillée comme manquements à la sécurité.
title: Eight girls arrested on suspicion of arson after Kenya school fire

narrative_analysis: The affected Black Sudanese civilians appear here as passive victims of paramilitary violence, with their suffering reduced to a casualty count and a humanitarian statistic.
cui_bono: RSF paramilitary leaders and allied militias controlling resource-rich territories.
summary: RSF-affiliated fighters killed at least 27 civilians in North Kordofan, Sudan, during Eid al-Adha. The attack worsens a humanitarian crisis where 19.5 million face severe hunger amid ongoing civil war.
title_en: Sudan medical group says RSF-affiliated fighters kill 27 civilians
title_es: Grupo médico de Sudán dice que combatientes vinculados a las RSF matan a 27 civiles
title_pt: Grupo médico do Sudão diz que combatentes ligados às RSF matam 27 civis
title_fr: Un groupe médical soudanais déclare que des combattants affiliés aux RSF tuent 27 civils
summary_es: Combatientes vinculados a las RSF mataron al menos a 27 civiles en el norte de Kordofán, Sudán, durante el Eid al-Adha. El ataque empeora una crisis humanitaria donde 19,5 millones enfrentan hambre severa en medio de la guerra civil.
summary_pt: Combatentes ligados às RSF mataram pelo menos 27 civis no norte de Kordofan, Sudão, durante o Eid al-Adha. O ataque agrava uma crise humanitária onde 19,5 milhões enfrentam fome severa em meio à guerra civil.
summary_fr: Des combattants affiliés aux RSF ont tué au moins 27 civils dans le nord du Kordofan, au Soudan, pendant l'Aïd al-Adha. L'attaque aggrave une crise humanitaire où 19,5 millions de personnes souffrent d'une faim sévère au milieu de la guerre civile.
title: Sudan medical group says RSF-affiliated fighters kill 27 civilians

narrative_analysis: Kenya is cast as a convenient dumping ground for US health risks, implying Black lives are expendable in global power dynamics.
cui_bono: The United States government benefits by externalizing quarantine costs and risks.
summary: A Kenyan court suspends a US plan to build an Ebola quarantine facility for American nationals in Kenya, amid backlash over secrecy and health risks. Activists and doctors argue the deal exploits Kenya and exposes its population to danger.
title_en: Kenyan court suspends US Ebola quarantine facility plan
title_es: Tribunal de Kenia suspende el plan estadounidense de instalación de cuarentena para el ébola
title_pt: Tribunal do Quênia suspende plano dos EUA para instalação de quarentena contra Ebola
title_fr: Un tribunal kényan suspend le projet américain d'installation de quarantaine pour Ebola
summary_es: Un tribunal keniano suspende el plan de EE.UU. para construir una instalación de cuarentena para el ébola en Kenia, en medio de rechazo por el secretismo y los riesgos sanitarios. Activistas y médicos argumentan que el acuerdo explota a Kenia y expone a su población al peligro.
summary_pt: Um tribunal queniano suspende o plano dos EUA de construir uma instalação de quarentena para Ebola no Quênia, em meio a críticas sobre sigilo e riscos à saúde. Ativistas e médicos argumentam que o acordo explora o Quênia e expõe sua população ao perigo.
summary_fr: Un tribunal kényan suspend le projet américain de construction d'une installation de quarantaine pour Ebola au Kenya, suscitant des critiques sur le secret et les risques sanitaires. Des militants et des médecins affirment que l'accord exploite le Kenya et expose sa population au danger.
title: Kenyan court suspends US Ebola quarantine facility plan

narrative_analysis: Ethiopians emerge as a bundle of ethnic percentages and conflict zones, their lived realities flattened into data points for a geopolitical map.
cui_bono: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's Prosperity Party benefits from this narrative of managed diversity.
summary: The article provides a visual guide to Ethiopia's ethnic groups and conflict areas ahead of the June 1 elections. It highlights the country's diversity, recent wars, and economic challenges without directly addressing systemic racism.
title_en: A visual guide to Ethiopia’s ethnic groups and conflict areas
title_es: Una guía visual de los grupos étnicos y las zonas de conflicto de Etiopía
title_pt: Um guia visual dos grupos étnicos e áreas de conflito da Etiópia
title_fr: Un guide visuel des groupes ethniques et des zones de conflit en Éthiopie
summary_es: El artículo ofrece una guía visual de los grupos étnicos y zonas de conflicto de Etiopía de cara a las elecciones del 1 de junio. Destaca la diversidad del país, las guerras recientes y los desafíos económicos sin abordar directamente el racismo sistémico.
summary_pt: O artigo oferece um guia visual dos grupos étnicos e áreas de conflito da Etiópia antes das eleições de 1º de junho. Destaca a diversidade do país, as guerras recentes e os desafios econômicos sem abordar diretamente o racismo sistêmico.
summary_fr: L'article propose un guide visuel des groupes ethniques et des zones de conflit en Éthiopie en vue des élections du 1er juin. Il souligne la diversité du pays, les guerres récentes et les défis économiques sans aborder directement le racisme systémique.
title: A visual guide to Ethiopia’s ethnic groups and conflict areas

narrative_analysis: Ethiopians appear as pawns in a rigged political game, pressured to attend rallies and excluded from genuine electoral choice, implying systemic disenfranchisement.
cui_bono: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's Prosperity Party benefits most.
summary: Ethiopia holds general elections on June 1, 2026, with the ruling Prosperity Party expected to win amid opposition fragmentation and violence. Critics say the polls are symbolic, as large regions remain unstable and opposition voices are suppressed.
title_en: Ethiopia to vote on June 1 as Abiy’s ruling party eyes landslide victory
title_es: Etiopía vota el 1 de junio mientras el partido gobernante de Abiy busca una victoria aplastante
title_pt: Etiópia vota em 1º de junho enquanto partido governante de Abiy mira vitória esmagadora
title_fr: L'Éthiopie vote le 1er juin alors que le parti au pouvoir d'Abiy vise une victoire écrasante
summary_es: Etiopía celebra elecciones generales el 1 de junio de 2026, con el partido gobernante Prosperidad esperado a ganar en medio de la fragmentación de la oposición y la violencia. Los críticos dicen que las urnas son simbólicas, ya que grandes regiones permanecen inestables y las voces de la oposición son suprimidas.
summary_pt: A Etiópia realiza eleições gerais em 1º de junho de 2026, com o partido governante Prosperidade esperado para vencer em meio à fragmentação da oposição e violência. Críticos dizem que as urnas são simbólicas, já que grandes regiões permanecem instáveis e vozes da oposição são suprimidas.
summary_fr: L'Éthiopie organise des élections générales le 1er juin 2026, avec le parti au pouvoir Prospérité attendu pour gagner au milieu de la fragmentation de l'opposition et de la violence. Les critiques disent que les urnes sont symboliques, car de grandes régions restent instables et les voix de l'opposition sont supprimées.
title: Ethiopia to vote on June 1 as Abiy’s ruling party eyes landslide victory

narrative_analysis: Readers meet these communities mainly as case counts and death tolls, depersonalizing the crisis and obscuring the human cost behind systemic neglect.
cui_bono: Pharmaceutical companies awaiting vaccine trials.
summary: The WHO chief visits Ituri as the DRC faces its 17th Ebola outbreak, with 121 confirmed cases and 246 suspected deaths. The Bundibugyo strain lacks approved treatments, and health workers struggle with scarce supplies amid public anger.
title_en: WHO chief heads to ‘hardest hit’ Ituri as DRC’s 17th Ebola outbreak spreads
title_es: El jefe de la OMS viaja a Ituri, la zona más afectada, mientras se extiende el 17.º brote de ébola en la RDC
title_pt: Chefe da OMS vai a Ituri, o mais atingido, enquanto o 17.º surto de Ebola se espalha na RDC
title_fr: Le chef de l’OMS se rend dans l’Ituri, le plus touché, alors que la 17e épidémie d’Ebola s’étend en RDC
summary_es: El jefe de la OMS visita Ituri mientras la RDC enfrenta su 17.º brote de ébola, con 121 casos confirmados y 246 muertes sospechosas. La cepa Bundibugyo carece de tratamientos aprobados y los trabajadores sanitarios luchan con suministros escasos en medio de la ira pública.
summary_pt: O chefe da OMS visita Ituri enquanto a RDC enfrenta seu 17.º surto de Ebola, com 121 casos confirmados e 246 mortes suspeitas. A cepa Bundibugyo carece de tratamentos aprovados e os trabalhadores de saúde lutam com suprimentos escassos em meio à raiva pública.
summary_fr: Le chef de l’OMS se rend dans l’Ituri alors que la RDC fait face à sa 17e épidémie d’Ebola, avec 121 cas confirmés et 246 décès suspects. La souche Bundibugyo manque de traitements approuvés et les soignants luttent avec des fournitures rares au milieu de la colère publique.
title: WHO chief heads to ‘hardest hit’ Ituri as DRC’s 17th Ebola outbreak spreads

narrative_analysis: Ghanaian society is depicted as defending cultural and legal traditions against external pressure, but this resistance overlooks the compounded vulnerability of Black LGBTQ+ individuals.
cui_bono: Conservative political and religious leaders in Ghana.
summary: Ghana's Parliament has passed the Human Sexual Rights and Family Values Bill, known as the anti-LGBTQ+ bill, sparking debate. President Mahama states the bill aligns with Ghanaian traditions and the rule of law, while Human Rights Watch warns it threatens fundamental rights.
title_en: Ghana's Parliament Passes Anti-LGBTQI+ Bill
title_es: El Parlamento de Ghana Aprueba el Proyecto de Ley Anti-LGBTQI+
title_pt: Parlamento de Gana Aprova Projeto de Lei Anti-LGBTQI+
title_fr: Le Parlement du Ghana Adopte le Projet de Loi Anti-LGBTQI+
summary_es: El Parlamento de Ghana aprobó el Proyecto de Ley de Derechos Sexuales Humanos y Valores Familiares, conocido como la ley anti-LGBTQ+. El presidente Mahama dice que se alinea con las tradiciones y el estado de derecho, mientras que Human Rights Watch advierte que amenaza derechos fundamentales.
summary_pt: O Parlamento de Gana aprovou o Projeto de Lei dos Direitos Sexuais Humanos e Valores Familiares, conhecido como lei anti-LGBTQ+. O presidente Mahama afirma que está alinhado com as tradições e o Estado de Direito, enquanto a Human Rights Watch alerta que ameaça direitos fundamentais.
summary_fr: Le Parlement du Ghana a adopté le projet de loi sur les droits sexuels humains et les valeurs familiales, connu sous le nom de loi anti-LGBTQ+. Le président Mahama déclare qu'il s'aligne sur les traditions et l'État de droit, tandis que Human Rights Watch prévient qu'il menace les droits fondamentaux.
title: Ghana's Parliament Passes Anti-LGBTQI+ Bill

narrative_analysis: The coverage reduces the tragedy to arrest counts and casualty numbers, erasing the young victims' humanity behind a procedural, detached lens.
cui_bono: Private security firms and infrastructure contractors that profit from school safety contracts.
summary: Fifteen girls died and over 100 were injured in a dormitory fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Kenya. Police arrested eight students on suspicion of arson, while an investigation also exposed school board safety failures.
title_en: Kenya Police Arrest Students After Deadly School Fire
title_es: Policía de Kenia arresta a estudiantes después de un mortal incendio escolar
title_pt: Polícia do Quênia prende estudantes após incêndio mortal em escola
title_fr: La police kenyane arrête des élèves après un incendie mortel dans une école
summary_es: Quince niñas murieron y más de 100 resultaron heridas en un incendio en el dormitorio de la Academia Utumishi Girls en Gilgil, Kenia. La policía arrestó a ocho estudiantes sospechosos de incendio provocado, mientras una investigación también reveló fallas de seguridad del consejo escolar.
summary_pt: Quinze meninas morreram e mais de 100 ficaram feridas em um incêndio no dormitório da Utumishi Girls Academy em Gilgil, Quênia. A polícia prendeu oito estudantes suspeitos de incêndio criminoso, enquanto uma investigação também expôs falhas de segurança do conselho escolar.
summary_fr: Quinze filles sont mortes et plus de 100 ont été blessées dans un incendie de dortoir à l'Académie Utumishi Girls à Gilgil, au Kenya. La police a arrêté huit élèves soupçonnés d'incendie criminel, tandis qu'une enquête a également révélé des défaillances de sécurité du conseil scolaire.
title: Kenya Police Arrest Students After Deadly School Fire

narrative_analysis: The Ovaherero and Nama peoples are portrayed as victims of a colonial atrocity whose legacy demands archaeological documentation and reparatory justice.
cui_bono: Germany benefits from delaying full acknowledgment and reparations for the genocide.
summary: The article discusses the 1904-1908 genocide of the Ovaherero and Nama people under German colonial rule, emphasizing the incomplete historical record and the role of archaeology in preserving memory. It highlights Namibia's Genocide Remembrance Day and ongoing negotiations for reparations with Germany, reflecting demands for justice and acknowledgment.
title_en: Unearthing Namibia's Forgotten Genocide Through Archaeology
title_es: Descubriendo el genocidio olvidado de Namibia a través de la arqueología
title_pt: Desenterrando o genocídio esquecido da Namíbia através da arqueologia
title_fr: Exhumer le génocide oublié de la Namibie à travers l'archéologie
summary_es: El artículo aborda el genocidio de 1904-1908 contra los pueblos Ovaherero y Nama bajo el dominio colonial alemán, destacando el registro histórico incompleto y el papel de la arqueología para preservar la memoria. Subraya el Día del Recuerdo del Genocidio en Namibia y las negociaciones en curso sobre reparaciones con Alemania.
summary_pt: O artigo discute o genocídio de 1904-1908 contra os povos Ovaherero e Nama sob o domínio colonial alemão, enfatizando o registro histórico incompleto e o papel da arqueologia na preservação da memória. Destaca o Dia da Lembrança do Genocídio na Namíbia e as negociações em curso sobre reparações com a Alemanha.
summary_fr: L'article traite du génocide de 1904-1908 contre les peuples Ovaherero et Nama sous la domination coloniale allemande, soulignant le bilan historique incomplet et le rôle de l'archéologie pour préserver la mémoire. Il met en lumière la Journée du Souvenir du Génocide en Namibie et les négociations en cours sur les réparations avec l'Allemagne.
title: Unearthing Namibia's Forgotten Genocide Through Archaeology

narrative_analysis: Nigerians are presented as a population enduring hardship for macroeconomic stabilization, their suffering framed as a necessary sacrifice for future fiscal health.
cui_bono: The Nigerian government and international creditors benefit.
summary: President Tinubu defends his economic reforms, including fuel subsidy removal and forex changes, as necessary to avert fiscal collapse. He acknowledges the hardship Nigerians face but insists long-term benefits will vindicate his decisions.
title_en: After 3 Years, Tinubu Defends Economic Reforms in Nigeria
title_es: Después de 3 años, Tinubu defiende las reformas económicas en Nigeria
title_pt: Após 3 anos, Tinubu defende reformas econômicas na Nigéria
title_fr: Après 3 ans, Tinubu défend les réformes économiques au Nigéria
summary_es: El presidente Tinubu defiende sus reformas económicas, incluida la eliminación del subsidio al combustible y los cambios en el tipo de cambio, como necesarias para evitar un colapso fiscal. Reconoce las dificultades que enfrentan los nigerianos, pero insiste en que los beneficios a largo plazo justificarán sus decisiones.
summary_pt: O presidente Tinubu defende suas reformas econômicas, incluindo a remoção do subsídio ao combustível e as mudanças cambiais, como necessárias para evitar um colapso fiscal. Ele reconhece as dificuldades enfrentadas pelos nigerianos, mas insiste que os benefícios de longo prazo justificarão suas decisões.
summary_fr: Le président Tinubu défend ses réformes économiques, notamment la suppression de la subvention au carburant et les changements de taux de change, comme nécessaires pour éviter un effondrement budgétaire. Il reconnaît les difficultés rencontrées par les Nigérians, mais insiste sur le fait que les avantages à long terme justifieront ses décisions.
title: After 3 Years, Tinubu Defends Economic Reforms in Nigeria

narrative_analysis: The Congolese are depicted overwhelmingly as passive victims trapped between disease and violence, their agency erased by framing that centers international institutions as saviors.
cui_bono: International pharmaceutical companies gain from outbreak-driven vaccine and treatment contracts.
summary: The WHO warns of a catastrophic Ebola outbreak in eastern DR Congo, worsened by armed conflict, displacement, and hunger. The Director-General pleads for a ceasefire to allow health workers to contain the fast-spreading virus.
title_en: WHO Calls for Ceasefire to Stop 'Catastrophic' Ebola in DR Congo
title_es: La OMS pide un alto el fuego para detener el ébola 'catastrófico' en la RDC
title_pt: OMS pede cessar-fogo para conter ébola 'catastrófico' na RDC
title_fr: L'OMS appelle à un cessez-le-feu pour arrêter l'Ebola 'catastrophique' en RDC
summary_es: La OMS advierte sobre un brote catastrófico de ébola en el este de la RDC, agravado por conflictos armados, desplazamientos y hambruna. El director general implora un alto el fuego para contener el virus.
summary_pt: A OMS alerta para um surto catastrófico de ébola no leste da RDC, agravado por conflitos armados, deslocamentos e fome. O diretor-geral implora por um cessar-fogo para conter o vírus.
summary_fr: L'OMS met en garde contre une flambée catastrophique d'Ebola dans l'est de la RDC, aggravée par les conflits armés, les déplacements et la faim. Le directeur général implore un cessez-le-feu pour contenir le virus.
title: WHO Calls for Ceasefire to Stop 'Catastrophic' Ebola in DR Congo

narrative_analysis: Kenyans are portrayed as assertive actors defending their national sovereignty and public health against an outside power's risky proposal.
cui_bono: U.S. government benefits by avoiding quarantine on its soil.
summary: Kenya's High Court temporarily halted a U.S. plan to set up an Ebola quarantine facility for exposed Americans. The Law Society of Kenya and other groups opposed the proposal, citing health risks and arguing such facilities belong near outbreak epicenters.
title_en: Court Stops U.S. Plan to Treat Ebola-Exposed Americans in Kenya
title_es: Tribunal detiene el plan de EE.UU. para tratar a estadounidenses expuestos al ébola en Kenia
title_pt: Tribunal interrompe plano dos EUA para tratar americanos expostos ao ebola no Quênia
title_fr: Le tribunal bloque le plan américain visant à traiter au Kenya des Américains exposés à Ebola
summary_es: El Tribunal Superior de Kenia suspendió temporalmente un plan de EE.UU. para instalar una instalación de cuarentena para ébola para estadounidenses expuestos. El Colegio de Abogados de Kenia se opuso, citando riesgos para la salud pública.
summary_pt: O Tribunal Superior do Quênia suspendeu temporariamente um plano dos EUA para instalar uma instalação de quarentena para ebola para americanos expostos. A Sociedade de Advogados do Quênia se opôs, citando riscos à saúde pública.
summary_fr: La Haute Cour du Kenya a temporairement suspendu un plan américain visant à installer un centre de quarantaine pour Ebola destiné aux Américains exposés. L'Ordre des avocats du Kenya s'y est opposé, invoquant des risques pour la santé publique.
title: Court Stops U.S. Plan to Treat Ebola-Exposed Americans in Kenya

narrative_analysis: Liberian officials are presented as subjects of a routine administrative reform, with no racial or structural context attached to their actions.
cui_bono: The Liberian government and President Boakai's administration.
summary: President Boakai restricts foreign travel for Liberian officials to curb excessive spending and improve cabinet participation, introducing a virtual attendance policy. The directive requires prior presidential approval for all official trips, emphasizing national interest.
title_en: Boakai Restricts Foreign Travel By Liberian Officials
title_es: Boakai restringe los viajes al extranjero de funcionarios liberianos

narrative_analysis: The story presents African nations and leaders as opportunities for corporate deals and investment, reducing Black communities to economic statistics on a global business agenda.

It emphasizes the role of the Corporate Council on Africa in facilitating billions of dollars in deals since 2001.
title_en: U.S.-Africa Business Summit - CCA & Mauritius Are Ready! REGISTER
title_es: Cumbre de Negocios EE.UU.-África - ¡CCA y Mauricio están listos! REGÍSTRESE
title_pt: Cúpula de Negócios EUA-África - CCA e Maurício Estão Prontos! REGISTRE-SE

Enfatiza el papel del Corporate Council on Africa en facilitar miles de millones de dólares en acuerdos desde 2001.
summary_pt: O artigo anuncia a 18ª Cúpula de Negócios EUA-África em Maurício, destacando reuniões de alto nível entre autoridades dos EUA, líderes africanos e empresários para promover comércio e investimento. Il souligne le rôle du Corporate Council on Africa dans la facilitation de milliards de dollars d'accords depuis 2001.
title: U.S.-Africa Business Summit - CCA & Mauritius Are Ready! REGISTER

narrative_analysis: Benin is presented as a successful democratic exception in West Africa, implying that stable governance is remarkable for the region.
cui_bono: International financial institutions and foreign investors benefit from stable governance narratives.
summary: The article highlights Benin's political stability and democratic progress, contrasting it with neighboring countries experiencing coups. It portrays Benin as a model for peaceful governance in West Africa.
title_en: Benin: Teaching How It Should Be Done Without Coups!
title_es: Benín: ¡Enseñando cómo se debe hacer sin golpes de estado!
title_pt: Benim: Ensinando como deve ser feito sem golpes!
title_fr: Bénin : Enseigner comment il faut faire sans coups d'État !
summary_es: El artículo destaca la estabilidad política y el progreso democrático de Benín, contrastándolo con países vecinos que experimentan golpes de estado. Presenta a Benín como un modelo de gobernanza pacífica en África Occidental.
summary_pt: O artigo destaca a estabilidade política e o progresso democrático do Benin, contrastando com países vizinhos que enfrentam golpes. Apresenta o Benin como um modelo de governança pacífica na África Ocidental.
summary_fr: L'article souligne la stabilité politique et les progrès démocratiques du Bénin, le contrastant avec les pays voisins confrontés à des coups d'État. Il présente le Bénin comme un modèle de gouvernance pacifique en Afrique de l'Ouest.
title: Benin:Benin Teaching How It Should Be Done Without Coups!(allAfrica)

narrative_analysis: Ugandans appear as passive recipients of a U.S.-led response, implying their agency is undermined by external control over their health crisis.
cui_bono: U.S. pharmaceutical and biodefense industries gain from shaping global health protocols.
summary: The article critiques the U.S.-Uganda plan to contain Ebola, arguing it prioritizes Western containment strategies over local expertise and community needs. It highlights how structural inequalities and colonial legacies shape global health responses, often sidelining African nations.
title_en: Uganda: What's Wrong With How U.S. and Uganda Plan to Stop Ebola Spreading
title_es: Uganda: Lo que está mal en cómo EE.UU. y Uganda planean detener la propagación del ébola
title_pt: Uganda: O que está errado na forma como os EUA e Uganda planejam parar a propagação do Ebola
title_fr: Ouganda : Ce qui cloche dans la façon dont les États-Unis et l'Ouganda prévoient d'arrêter la propagation d'Ebola
summary_es: El artículo critica el plan de EE.UU. y Uganda para contener el ébola, argumentando que prioriza las estrategias occidentales sobre la experiencia local y las necesidades comunitarias. Destaca cómo las desigualdades estructurales y los legados coloniales moldean las respuestas sanitarias globales, marginando a las naciones africanas.
summary_pt: O artigo critica o plano dos EUA e Uganda para conter o Ebola, argumentando que prioriza estratégias ocidentais em detrimento da experiência local e das necessidades comunitárias. Destaca como desigualdades estruturais e legados coloniais moldam respostas globais de saúde, marginalizando nações africanas.
summary_fr: L'article critique le plan des États-Unis et de l'Ouganda pour contenir Ebola, arguant qu'il privilégie les stratégies occidentales au détriment de l'expertise locale et des besoins communautaires. Il souligne comment les inégalités structurelles et les héritages coloniaux façonnent les réponses sanitaires mondiales, marginalisant les nations africaines.
title: Uganda:What's Wrong With How U.S. and Uganda Plan to Stop Ebola Spreading(The Conversation Africa)

narrative_analysis: Somalis engaged in piracy are depicted as a threat driven by external forces, reinforcing stereotypes of lawlessness and instability.
cui_bono: International shipping companies and private security firms.
summary: The article discusses the resurgence of Somali piracy, linking it to political turmoil, aid cuts, and the Iran war. It highlights how these factors create conditions for piracy to thrive off the Somali coast.
title_en: Somalia: Somali Piracy Is Back - Fuelled By Political Turmoil, Aid Cuts and the Iran War
title_es: Somalia: La piratería somalí ha vuelto - alimentada por la agitación política, los recortes de ayuda y la guerra de Irán
title_pt: Somália: A pirataria somali está de volta - alimentada por turbulência política, cortes de ajuda e a guerra do Irã
title_fr: Somalie : La piraterie somalienne est de retour - alimentée par les troubles politiques, les coupes d'aide et la guerre en Iran
summary_es: El artículo analiza el resurgimiento de la piratería somalí, vinculándolo a la agitación política, los recortes de ayuda y la guerra de Irán. Destaca cómo estos factores crean condiciones para que la piratería prospere frente a la costa somalí.
summary_pt: O artigo discute o ressurgimento da pirataria somali, ligando-o à turbulência política, cortes de ajuda e à guerra do Irã. Destaca como esses fatores criam condições para a pirataria prosperar na costa da Somália.
summary_fr: L'article examine la résurgence de la piraterie somalienne, la reliant aux troubles politiques, aux coupes d'aide et à la guerre en Iran. Il souligne comment ces facteurs créent des conditions propices à la piraterie au large des côtes somaliennes.
title: Somalia:Somali Piracy Is Back - Fuelled By Political Turmoil, Aid Cuts and the Iran War(The Conversation Africa)

narrative_analysis: The story presents Black Ghanaians as lawmakers enacting moral legislation, but the framing obscures how colonial-era laws on sexuality are recycled to serve political interests.
cui_bono: Conservative political factions and religious institutions in Ghana.
summary: Ghana's parliament has passed an anti-LGBTQI+ bill, reflecting ongoing debates over morality and human rights. The move draws on colonial-era legislation and has sparked both local support and international criticism.
title_en: Ghana: Parliament Passes Anti-LGBTQI+ Bill
title_es: Ghana: El Parlamento aprueba proyecto de ley contra LGBTQI+
title_pt: Gana: Parlamento aprova projeto de lei anti-LGBTQI+
title_fr: Ghana : Le Parlement adopte un projet de loi anti-LGBTQI+
summary_es: El parlamento de Ghana aprobó un proyecto de ley contra LGBTQI+, que refleja debates en curso sobre moralidad y derechos humanos. La medida se basa en legislación de la época colonial y ha generado tanto apoyo local como críticas internacionales.
summary_pt: O parlamento de Gana aprovou um projeto de lei anti-LGBTQI+, refletindo debates contínuos sobre moralidade e direitos humanos. A medida baseia-se em legislação da era colonial e gerou tanto apoio local quanto críticas internacionais.
summary_fr: Le parlement ghanéen a adopté un projet de loi anti-LGBTQI+, reflétant des débats en cours sur la moralité et les droits humains. La mesure s'appuie sur une législation coloniale et a suscité à la fois un soutien local et des critiques internationales.
title: Ghana:Parliament Passes Anti-LGBTQI+ Bill(Ghanaian Times)

narrative_analysis: Black LGBTQ+ Ghanaians are depicted as targets of state-sanctioned discrimination, implying that colonial-era moral codes continue to shape modern legal persecution.
cui_bono: Conservative religious and political elites in Ghana benefit from this law.
summary: Ghana's parliament has passed an anti-LGBTQ bill, now awaiting the president's signature. The legislation criminalizes LGBTQ identities and advocacy, drawing international concern.

summary_es: El parlamento de Ghana ha aprobado un proyecto de ley anti-LGBTQ, que ahora espera la firma del presidente. La legislación criminaliza las identidades y la defensa LGBTQ, generando preocupación internacional.
summary_pt: O parlamento de Gana aprovou um projeto de lei anti-LGBTQ, agora aguardando a assinatura do presidente. A legislação criminaliza identidades e defesa LGBTQ, gerando preocupação internacional.
summary_fr: Le Parlement ghanéen a adopté un projet de loi anti-LGBTQ, en attendant la signature du président. La législation criminalise les identités et la défense LGBTQ, suscitant des inquiétudes internationales.
title: Ghana:Ghana Parliament Approves 'Anti-LGBTQ' Law, Awaiting President's Signature(RFI)

narrative_analysis: Reduced to a credit rating outcome, the Congolese population is invisible while international finance dictates the nation's economic narrative.

summary: Moody's has raised the outlook for Congo-Brazzaville following a debt refinancing deal. The change signals improved liquidity but reflects decisions made by creditors, not improved local conditions.
title_en: Congo-Brazzaville: Moody's Raises Congo Republic Outlook On Debt Refinancing
title_es: Congo-Brazzaville: Moody's mejora la perspectiva de la República del Congo por refinanciación de deuda

summary_pt: A Moody's melhorou a perspectiva do Congo-Brazzaville após um acordo de refinanciamento da dívida. A mudança sinaliza maior liquidez, mas reflete decisões dos credores, não melhores condições locais.

narrative_analysis: Africans become depersonalized data points in a State Department update, their suffering reduced to progress metrics and response timelines.
cui_bono: U.S. pharmaceutical corporations and global health bureaucracies.
summary: The U.S. State Department issued an update on the Ebola response in Africa as of May 29, 2026, detailing containment efforts and international aid commitments. The report focuses on logistical coordination and funding allocations without mentioning local communities or systemic vulnerabilities.
title_en: Africa: Ebola Response Update - May 29, 2026 from the U.S. State Department
title_es: África: Actualización sobre la respuesta al ébola - 29 de mayo de 2026 del Departamento de Estado de EE.UU.
title_pt: África: Atualização da Resposta ao Ebola - 29 de maio de 2026 do Departamento de Estado dos EUA
title_fr: Afrique : Mise à jour sur la réponse à Ebola - 29 mai 2026 du Département d'État américain
summary_es: El Departamento de Estado de EE.UU. emitió una actualización sobre la respuesta al ébola en África al 29 de mayo de 2026, detallando los esfuerzos de contención y los compromisos de ayuda internacional. El informe se enfoca en la coordinación logística y las asignaciones de fondos sin mencionar a las comunidades locales ni las vulnerabilidades sistémicas.
summary_pt: O Departamento de Estado dos EUA emitiu uma atualização sobre a resposta ao Ebola na África em 29 de maio de 2026, detalhando esforços de contenção e compromissos de ajuda internacional. O relatório foca na coordenação logística e alocações de financiamento sem mencionar comunidades locais ou vulnerabilidades sistêmicas.
summary_fr: Le Département d'État américain a publié une mise à jour sur la réponse à Ebola en Afrique au 29 mai 2026, détaillant les efforts de confinement et les engagements d'aide internationale. Le rapport se concentre sur la coordination logistique et les allocations de financement sans mentionner les communautés locales ni les vulnérabilités systémiques.
title: Africa:Ebola Response Update - May 29, 2026 from the U.S. State Department(State Department)

narrative_analysis: Africans are depicted as unprepared and vulnerable, reduced to a systemic weakness in global health security within a numerical risk analysis.
cui_bono: Global pharmaceutical corporations and wealthy nations.
summary: The article discusses how Africa and the world remain dangerously unprepared for future pandemics due to inadequate health infrastructure, economic disparities, and systemic neglect. It highlights the need for global cooperation and investment in public health systems to prevent catastrophic outcomes.
title_en: Why Africa - and the World - Remain Dangerously Unprepared for the Next Pandemic
title_es: Por qué África - y el mundo - siguen peligrosamente desprevenidos para la próxima pandemia
title_pt: Por que a África - e o mundo - continuam perigosamente despreparados para a próxima pandemia
title_fr: Pourquoi l'Afrique - et le monde - restent dangereusement mal préparés pour la prochaine pandémie
summary_es: El artículo analiza cómo África y el mundo siguen peligrosamente desprevenidos para futuras pandemias debido a infraestructuras sanitarias inadecuadas, disparidades económicas y abandono sistémico. Destaca la necesidad de cooperación global e inversión en sistemas de salud pública.
summary_pt: O artigo discute como a África e o mundo continuam perigosamente despreparados para futuras pandemias devido à infraestrutura de saúde inadequada, disparidades econômicas e negligência sistêmica. Destaca a necessidade de cooperação global e investimento em sistemas de saúde pública.
summary_fr: L'article explique comment l'Afrique et le monde restent dangereusement mal préparés aux futures pandémies en raison d'infrastructures de santé inadéquates, de disparités économiques et d'un abandon systémique. Il souligne la nécessité d'une coopération mondiale et d'investissements dans les systèmes de santé publique.
title: Africa:Why Africa - and the World - Remain Dangerously Unprepared for the Next Pandemic(The Conversation Africa)

narrative_analysis: Students are portrayed as perpetrators of violence, reinforcing a narrative of youthful criminality that overshadows underlying systemic issues in Kenya's boarding schools.
cui_bono: The school administration and government officials seeking to shift blame.
summary: Students were arrested following a deadly arson attack at Utumishi School in Kenya. The incident highlights ongoing safety and disciplinary crises within the country's educational system.

summary_pt: Estudantes foram presos após um incêndio criminoso mortal na Escola Utumishi, no Quênia. O incidente destaca as crises de segurança e disciplina no sistema educacional do país.

narrative_analysis: The article reduces Black South Africans to statistics of TB cases and tobacco use, obscuring the systemic inequality driving these health disparities.
cui_bono: Tobacco and nicotine industries benefit from continued addiction in South Africa.
summary: The article argues that South Africa cannot end tuberculosis without addressing tobacco and nicotine addiction, which are major risk factors. It highlights the high rates of smoking and vaping in Black communities and links them to the country's TB burden.
title_en: South Africa: SA Cannot End TB While Tobacco and Nicotine Addiction Go Unchecked
title_es: Sudáfrica: Sudáfrica no puede acabar con la tuberculosis mientras no se controle la adicción al tabaco y la nicotina
title_pt: África do Sul: A África do Sul não pode acabar com a TB enquanto o vício em tabaco e nicotina não for controlado
title_fr: Afrique du Sud : L'Afrique du Sud ne peut pas mettre fin à la tuberculose tant que la dépendance au tabac et à la nicotine n'est pas maîtrisée
summary_es: El artículo sostiene que Sudáfrica no puede erradicar la tuberculosis sin abordar la adicción al tabaco y la nicotina, que son factores de riesgo importantes. Destaca las altas tasas de tabaquismo en comunidades negras y las vincula con la carga de TB en el país.
summary_pt: O artigo argumenta que a África do Sul não pode acabar com a tuberculose sem abordar o vício em tabaco e nicotina, que são importantes fatores de risco. Destaca as altas taxas de tabagismo em comunidades negras e as vincula à carga de TB no país.
summary_fr: L'article soutient que l'Afrique du Sud ne peut pas éradiquer la tuberculose sans s'attaquer à la dépendance au tabac et à la nicotine, qui sont des facteurs de risque majeurs. Il souligne les taux élevés de tabagisme dans les communautés noires et les relie au fardeau de la TB dans le pays.
title: South Africa:SA Cannot End TB While Tobacco and Nicotine Addiction Go Unchecked(spotlight)

summary: President Boakai has restricted foreign travel for cabinet members, likely to curb spending and increase accountability. The story focuses on governance logistics without addressing deeper structural inequalities.

narrative_analysis: Nigerians are depicted as consumers burdened by soaring prices, with the government's pledge reducing their daily struggles to a matter of economic metrics.
cui_bono: The Nigerian government and political elites benefit from the framing.
summary: At his third anniversary, Nigerian President Bola Tinubu promises to lower food prices and cut transport costs, addressing inflation and hardship. The pledge comes amid widespread economic strain affecting Black communities across Nigeria.
title_en: Nigeria: At 3rd Anniversary, Tinubu Pledges to Keep Food Prices Low, Cut Transport Costs
title_es: Nigeria: En su tercer aniversario, Tinubu promete mantener bajos los precios de los alimentos y reducir los costos de transporte
title_pt: Nigéria: No 3º aniversário, Tinubu promete manter os preços dos alimentos baixos e reduzir os custos de transporte
title_fr: Nigeria : Au 3e anniversaire, Tinubu promet de maintenir les prix alimentaires bas et de réduire les coûts de transport
summary_es: En su tercer aniversario, el presidente nigeriano Bola Tinubu promete reducir los precios de los alimentos y los costos de transporte, abordando la inflación y las dificultades. La promesa surge en medio de una amplia tensión económica que afecta a las comunidades negras en toda Nigeria.
summary_pt: Em seu terceiro aniversário, o presidente nigeriano Bola Tinubu promete reduzir os preços dos alimentos e os custos de transporte, abordando a inflação e as dificuldades. A promessa surge em meio a uma ampla tensão econômica que afeta as comunidades negras em toda a Nigéria.
summary_fr: À son troisième anniversaire, le président nigérian Bola Tinubu promet de réduire les prix des denrées alimentaires et les coûts de transport, s'attaquant à l'inflation et aux difficultés. Cette promesse intervient dans un contexte de tensions économiques généralisées affectant les communautés noires à travers le Nigeria.
title: Nigeria:At 3rd Anniversary, Tinubu Pledges to Keep Food Prices Low, Cut Transport Costs(Leadership)

narrative_analysis: Black victims of police violence are treated as a data point, the FBI's slow data collection implying the suffering is routine rather than urgent.
cui_bono: Police departments and the U.S. Department of Justice.
summary: The story highlights that police brutality is common and longstanding, but notes the FBI only began collecting use-of-force data in 2019. This statistical framing obscures systemic failures and racial disparities behind a numbers-focused narrative.
title_en: Police Brutality - Yahoo Search Results
title_es: Brutalidad policial - Resultados de búsqueda de Yahoo
title_pt: Bruxaria policial - Resultados de pesquisa do Yahoo
title_fr: Brutalité policière - Résultats de recherche Yahoo
summary_es: La historia destaca que la brutalidad policial es común y antigua, pero señala que el FBI solo comenzó a recopilar datos sobre uso de la fuerza en 2019. Este encuadre estadístico oculta fallas sistémicas y disparidades raciales detrás de una narrativa centrada en números.
summary_pt: A história destaca que a brutalidade policial é comum e antiga, mas observa que o FBI só começou a coletar dados sobre uso da força em 2019. Esse enquadramento estatístico oculta falhas sistêmicas e disparidades raciais por trás de uma narrativa focada em números.
summary_fr: L'article souligne que la brutalité policière est courante et ancienne, mais note que le FBI n'a commencé à collecter des données sur l'usage de la force qu'en 2019. Ce cadrage statistique masque les défaillances systémiques et les disparités raciales derrière un récit centré sur les chiffres.
title: police brutality - Yahoo Search Results

narrative_analysis: Black residents appear as targets of systematic police abuse, their constitutional rights violated despite a majority-Black police force, exposing institutionalized racism.
cui_bono: Memphis Police Department and its officers benefit from unchecked authority.
summary: A DOJ report finds Memphis Police engaged in widespread discrimination against Black residents, including excessive force and unlawful stops. The city refused to enter a consent decree, citing insufficient time to review the findings.
title_en: DOJ Says Memphis Police Discriminated Against Black People
title_es: DOJ dice que la policía de Memphis discriminó a personas negras
title_pt: DOJ diz que polícia de Memphis discriminou pessoas negras
title_fr: Le DOJ déclare que la police de Memphis a discriminé les personnes noires
summary_es: Un informe del DOJ encuentra que la policía de Memphis discriminó generalizadamente a residentes negros, incluyendo uso excesivo de la fuerza y detenciones ilegales. La ciudad se negó a firmar un decreto de consentimiento, citando tiempo insuficiente para revisar los hallazgos.
summary_pt: Um relatório do DOJ constata que a polícia de Memphis discriminou amplamente residentes negros, incluindo uso excessivo de força e abordagens ilegais. A cidade recusou-se a firmar um decreto de consentimento, citando tempo insuficiente para revisar as conclusões.
summary_fr: Un rapport du DOJ révèle que la police de Memphis a largement discriminé les résidents noirs, notamment par l'usage excessif de la force et des interpellations illégales. La ville a refusé de signer un décret de consentement, invoquant un manque de temps pour examiner les conclusions.
title: DOJ Says Memphis Police Discriminated Against Black... - Newsweek

narrative_analysis: Black Americans appear here mainly as victims of state violence, with racism explicitly named as the root cause of police brutality.
cui_bono: Police departments and law enforcement unions.
summary: The article argues that racial discrimination is a primary cause of police brutality against Black communities. It examines historical and ongoing patterns of systemic racism within law enforcement.
title_en: Racial Discrimination: A Cause of Police Brutality
title_es: Discriminación racial: una causa de la brutalidad policial
title_pt: Discriminação Racial: Uma Causa da Brutalidade Policial
title_fr: Discrimination raciale : une cause de la brutalité policière
summary_es: El artículo sostiene que la discriminación racial es una causa principal de la brutalidad policial contra las comunidades negras. Examina patrones históricos y actuales de racismo sistémico dentro de las fuerzas del orden.
summary_pt: O artigo argumenta que a discriminação racial é uma causa primária da brutalidade policial contra comunidades negras. Examina padrões históricos e contínuos de racismo sistêmico na aplicação da lei.
summary_fr: L'article soutient que la discrimination raciale est une cause principale de la brutalité policière envers les communautés noires. Il examine les schémas historiques et actuels de racisme systémique au sein des forces de l'ordre.
title: Racial Discrimination: A Cause of Police Brutality - HubPages

narrative_analysis: African Americans are presented primarily as victims of systematic police torture and brutality, with the narrative emphasizing their suffering and legal protections that often fail.
cui_bono: Police departments and the criminal justice system benefit from unchecked power and impunity.
summary: The article analyzes police brutality against African Americans, detailing systemic discrimination and torture by law enforcement. It notes that despite legal protections like the Fourteenth Amendment and 1994's Act, Black people still face disproportionate punishment and rights violations.
title_en: Unveiling Discrimination: Police Brutality Against African Americans
title_es: Desvelando la discriminación: brutalidad policial contra los afroamericanos
title_pt: Revelando a discriminação: violência policial contra afro-americanos
title_fr: Dévoiler la discrimination : la brutalité policière contre les Afro-Américains
summary_es: El artículo analiza la brutalidad policial contra los afroamericanos, detallando la discriminación y tortura sistémicas por parte de las fuerzas del orden. Señala que, a pesar de protecciones legales como la Decimocuarta Enmienda y la Ley de 1994, las personas negras siguen enfrentando castigos desproporcionados y violaciones de derechos.
summary_pt: O artigo analisa a violência policial contra afro-americanos, detalhando a discriminação e tortura sistêmicas pelas forças policiais. Observa que, apesar de proteções legais como a Décima Quarta Emenda e a Lei de 1994, pessoas negras continuam enfrentando punições desproporcionais e violações de direitos.
summary_fr: L'article analyse la brutalité policière contre les Afro-Américains, détaillant la discrimination et la torture systématiques par les forces de l'ordre. Il note que, malgré les protections juridiques comme le Quatorzième Amendement et la loi de 1994, les personnes noires continuent de subir des punitions disproportionnées et des violations des droits.
title: Unveiling Discrimination: Police Brutality Against African Americans...

narrative_analysis: Black people are shown through disproportionate arrest and killing statistics, reducing their lived experience to numbers that underscore systemic distrust.
cui_bono: Police departments and the broader criminal justice system.
summary: This essay explores the mutual trust issue between police and minority communities, using statistics to highlight disproportionate police violence against Black people and biased school arrests. It argues that systemic discrimination undermines trust and calls for reform.
title_en: Police Brutality and the Mutual Trust Issue
title_es: Brutalidad Policial y el Problema de Confianza Mutua
title_pt: Bruxaria Policial e a Questão da Confiança Mútua
title_fr: La Brutalité Policière et le Problème de Confiance Mutuelle
summary_es: Este ensayo explora el problema de confianza mutua entre la policía y las comunidades minoritarias, usando estadísticas para destacar la violencia policial desproporcionada contra los negros y los arrestos escolares sesgados. Argumenta que la discriminación sistémica socava la confianza y pide reformas.
summary_pt: Este ensaio explora a questão da confiança mútua entre a polícia e as comunidades minoritárias, usando estatísticas para destacar a violência policial desproporcional contra negros e prisões escolares tendenciosas. Argumenta que a discriminação sistêmica mina a confiança e pede reformas.
summary_fr: Cet essai explore le problème de confiance mutuelle entre la police et les communautés minoritaires, en utilisant des statistiques pour souligner la violence policière disproportionnée contre les Noirs et les arrestations scolaires biaisées. Il soutient que la discrimination systémique sape la confiance et appelle à des réformes.
title: Police Brutality and the Mutual Trust Issue: [Essay Example], 665...

narrative_analysis: Black families are reduced to stark statistics of homelessness and poverty, obscuring the systemic racism and policy failures behind the disparity.
cui_bono: Landlords and real estate investors benefit from housing scarcity.
summary: The article reports that Black families are seven times more likely than white families to experience homelessness, with high poverty rates linked to unequal education and structural barriers. It calls on Black communities and government to take action through advocacy, donations, and policy expansion.
title_en: Want to Eliminate Black Homelessness? Do Something.
title_es: ¿Quieres Eliminar la Falta de Vivienda entre los Negros? Haz Algo.
title_pt: Quer Eliminar a Falta de Moradia entre os Negros? Faça Algo.
title_fr: Vous Voulez Éliminer le Sans-Abrisme chez les Noirs ? Faites Quelque Chose.
summary_es: El artículo informa que las familias negras tienen siete veces más probabilidades que las blancas de quedarse sin hogar, con altas tasas de pobreza vinculadas a la educación desigual y barreras estructurales. Insta a las comunidades negras y al gobierno a actuar mediante promoción, donaciones y expansión de políticas.
summary_pt: O artigo relata que famílias negras têm sete vezes mais chances do que brancas de ficarem desabrigadas, com altas taxas de pobreza ligadas à educação desigual e barreiras estruturais. Convoca comunidades negras e o governo a agir por meio de defesa, doações e expansão de políticas.
summary_fr: L'article rapporte que les familles noires sont sept fois plus susceptibles que les blanches de se retrouver sans abri, avec des taux de pauvreté élevés liés à une éducation inégale et à des barrières structurelles. Il appelle les communautés noires et le gouvernement à agir par le plaidoyer, les dons et l'expansion des politiques.
title: Want to Eliminate Black Homelessness? Do Something. | News | BET

narrative_analysis: The reporting frames Congolese communities as a backdrop for medical failure, reducing human suffering to case counts and epidemiological metrics.
cui_bono: International pharmaceutical corporations and global health agencies.
summary: The article covers the Ebola outbreak in a remote gold mining town in the Democratic Republic of Congo, focusing on the surge of deaths and infections. It highlights the struggles of medical workers to contain the virus.

title_fr: Au cœur de l'épidémie d'Ebola, le virus fait rage sans être stoppé

summary_pt: O artigo aborda o surto de Ebola em uma remota cidade mineradora de ouro na República Democrática do Congo, focando no aumento de mortes e infecções. Destaca as dificuldades dos trabalhadores médicos em conter o vírus.

narrative_analysis: The piece turns homeless Black Americans into a data problem to be solved, reducing their humanity to a crisis of numbers and metrics.
cui_bono: The screening tool developers and allied research institutions.
summary: The article discusses a new screening tool designed to address Black homelessness in the U.S., framing it as a crisis that requires better data collection and targeted interventions. It highlights structural factors but does not explicitly name racism, focusing instead on systemic neglect and statistical disparities.
title_en: Can a New Screening Tool Help Solve the Crisis of Black Homelessness?
title_es: ¿Puede una nueva herramienta de evaluación ayudar a resolver la crisis de la falta de vivienda entre los negros?
title_pt: Uma nova ferramenta de triagem pode ajudar a resolver a crise da falta de moradia entre negros?
title_fr: Un nouvel outil de dépistage peut-il aider à résoudre la crise du sans-abrisme chez les Noirs ?
summary_es: El artículo analiza una nueva herramienta de evaluación para abordar la falta de vivienda entre los negros en EE.UU., presentándola como una crisis que requiere mejores datos e intervenciones específicas. Destaca factores estructurales sin nombrar explícitamente el racismo.
summary_pt: O artigo discute uma nova ferramenta de triagem para lidar com a falta de moradia entre negros nos EUA, apresentando-a como uma crise que exige melhores dados e intervenções direcionadas. Destaca fatores estruturais sem nomear explicitamente o racismo.
summary_fr: L'article examine un nouvel outil de dépistage conçu pour lutter contre le sans-abrisme chez les Noirs aux États-Unis, le présentant comme une crise nécessitant de meilleures données et des interventions ciblées. Il met en lumière des facteurs structurels sans nommer explicitement le racisme.
title: Can a New Screening Tool Help Solve the Crisis of Black...

narrative_analysis: Black unhoused people are portrayed as a disproportionate statistic, highlighting systemic neglect while the article centers outrage over resource misallocation and criminalization.
cui_bono: The Los Angeles Police Department benefits from inflated budgets.
summary: The article reports that Black people make up 34% of LA's homeless population despite being 8% of the city's residents, linking this to police budget priorities and anti-camping laws. Activists argue that defunding the police and investing in housing could solve the crisis, and they condemn the criminalization of homelessness as a continuation of dehumanization rooted in slavery.
title_en: ‘A Sea of Black Mens’ Faces’: LA’s Black Homelessness Crisis
title_es: ‘Un mar de rostros de hombres negros’: La crisis de personas sin hogar negras en Los Ángeles
title_pt: ‘Um Mar de Rostros de Homens Negros’: A Crise de Moradores de Rua Negros em Los Angeles
title_fr: ‘Une mer de visages d’hommes noirs’ : La crise des sans-abri noirs à Los Angeles
summary_es: El artículo informa que las personas negras constituyen el 34% de la población sin hogar de Los Ángeles a pesar de ser el 8% de los residentes, vinculando esto a los presupuestos policiales y las leyes anticampamento. Los activistas argumentan que desfinanciar la policía e invertir en viviendas podría resolver la crisis y condenan la criminalización de las personas sin hogar como continuación de la deshumanización esclavista.
summary_pt: O artigo relata que pessoas negras compõem 34% da população em situação de rua em Los Angeles, apesar de serem 8% dos residentes, ligando isso aos orçamentos policiais e leis anti-acampamento. Ativistas argumentam que desfinanciar a polícia e investir em moradia poderia resolver a crise e condenam a criminalização como continuação da desumanização escravista.
summary_fr: L'article rapporte que les personnes noires représentent 34% des sans-abri de Los Angeles alors qu'elles ne sont que 8% des résidents, liant cela aux budgets policiers et aux lois anti-camping. Les militants plaident pour un désinvestissement policier au profit du logement et dénoncent la criminalisation comme une continuation de la déshumanisation esclavagiste.
title: ‘A Sea of Black Mens’ Faces’: LA’s Black Homelessness Crisis | LAist

narrative_analysis: Homelessness is presented as a general crisis of fire safety, erasing the specific overrepresentation of Black Nova Scotians in the unhoused population.
cui_bono: Private developers and real estate investors.
summary: The CBC report covers growing homelessness in Nova Scotia and linked fire risks, but does not examine racial disparities. Black communities face higher homelessness rates due to historical land dispossession and economic exclusion, yet this story treats poverty as a generic emergency.
title_en: As homeless population grows, so do concerns about deadly fires. CBC News Nova Scotia.
title_es: A medida que crece la población sin hogar, también aumentan las preocupaciones por incendios mortales. CBC News Nueva Escocia.
title_pt: À medida que a população sem-teto cresce, também crescem as preocupações com incêndios mortais. CBC News Nova Escócia.
title_fr: Alors que la population sans-abri augmente, les inquiétudes concernant les incendies mortels aussi. CBC News Nouvelle-Écosse.
summary_es: El reportaje de CBC cubre el creciente problema de personas sin hogar en Nueva Escocia y los riesgos de incendio, pero no analiza las disparidades raciales. Las comunidades negras sufren tasas más altas de falta de vivienda debido al despojo histórico de tierras y la exclusión económica, pero esta historia trata la pobreza como una emergencia genérica.
summary_pt: A reportagem da CBC cobre o crescente número de desabrigados na Nova Escócia e os riscos de incêndio, mas não examina as disparidades raciais. As comunidades negras sofrem taxas mais altas de falta de moradia devido à expropriação histórica de terras e exclusão econômica, mas esta história trata a pobreza como uma emergência genérica.
summary_fr: Le reportage de CBC couvre la croissance des sans-abri en Nouvelle-Écosse et les risques d'incendie, mais il n'examine pas les disparités raciales. Les communautés noires connaissent des taux d'itinérance plus élevés en raison de la dépossession foncière historique et de l'exclusion économique, mais ce récit traite la pauvreté comme une urgence générique.
title: NEWS: (Homelessness, Poverty) - YouTube

narrative_analysis: Black women are reduced to a stark mortality rate, erasing their lived experiences and the systemic failures behind the disparity.
cui_bono: The U.S. healthcare system and insurance industry.
summary: In 2023, Black women in the U.S. had a maternal mortality rate of 50.3 deaths per 100,000 live births, over three times higher than white women. The data highlights a persistent racial disparity in healthcare outcomes.

title_fr: E-Stats Santé, Février 2025, Taux de Mortalité Maternelle en ...
summary_es: En 2023, la tasa de mortalidad materna para mujeres negras en EE. UU. fue de 50.3 muertes por cada 100,000 nacidos vivos, más del triple que la de mujeres blancas. Los datos destacan una disparidad racial persistente en los resultados de salud.
summary_pt: Em 2023, a taxa de mortalidade materna para mulheres negras nos EUA foi de 50,3 mortes por 100.000 nascidos vivos, mais de três vezes maior que a de mulheres brancas. Os dados destacam uma disparidade racial persistente nos resultados de saúde.
summary_fr: En 2023, le taux de mortalité maternelle des femmes noires aux États-Unis était de 50,3 décès pour 100 000 naissances vivantes, soit plus de trois fois celui des femmes blanches. Les données mettent en évidence une disparité raciale persistante dans les résultats de santé.

narrative_analysis: Readers meet Black women through alarming mortality statistics and policy critiques, but the framing reduces them to data points, obscuring individual humanity and lived experience.
cui_bono: The U.S. healthcare system and its dominant institutions maintain power and profit.
summary: The article examines Black maternal mortality in the U.S., attributing the crisis to structural racism, policy exclusion, and neglect of Black-led care. It argues that current policies often reinforce inequities and calls for a power shift to community-based solutions.
title_en: Dismantling inequities to end the black maternal mortality crisis: a call for power-shifting solutions
title_es: Desmantelar las inequidades para acabar con la crisis de mortalidad materna negra: un llamado a soluciones que cambien el poder
title_pt: Desmantelar as iniquidades para acabar com a crise de mortalidade materna negra: um chamado para soluções que transfiram poder
title_fr: Démanteler les inégalités pour mettre fin à la crise de mortalité maternelle noire : un appel à des solutions de transfert de pouvoir
summary_es: El artículo examina la mortalidad materna negra en EE. UU., atribuyendo la crisis al racismo estructural, la exclusión política y la negligencia de modelos de atención liderados por negros. Argumenta que las políticas actuales a menudo refuerzan las inequidades y pide un cambio de poder hacia soluciones comunitarias.
summary_pt: O artigo examina a mortalidade materna negra nos EUA, atribuindo a crise ao racismo estrutural, exclusão política e negligência de modelos de cuidado liderados por negros. Argumenta que as políticas atuais frequentemente reforçam as iniquidades e pede uma mudança de poder para soluções comunitárias.
summary_fr: L'article examine la mortalité maternelle noire aux États-Unis, attribuant la crise au racisme structurel, à l'exclusion politique et à la négligence des modèles de soins dirigés par les Noirs. Il soutient que les politiques actuelles renforcent souvent les inégalités et appelle à un changement de pouvoir vers des solutions communautaires.
title: Dismantling inequities to end the black maternal mortality ...

narrative_analysis: Black women are reduced to a grim statistic, their deaths presented as a numerical disparity rather than a human tragedy demanding systemic change.
cui_bono: The for-profit healthcare system and insurance industry benefit from racial disparities.
summary: A March 2025 report from the National Center for Health Statistics shows the US maternal mortality rate for Black women was over three times higher than for other groups in 2023. The article presents the data without exploring the underlying structural causes.
title_en: Black Maternal Mortality Remains Disproportionately High
title_es: La Mortalidad Materna Negra Sigue Siendo Desproporcionadamente Alta

summary_es: Un informe de marzo de 2025 muestra que la tasa de mortalidad materna de mujeres negras en EE. UU. fue más del triple que la de otros grupos en 2023. El artículo presenta los datos sin explorar las causas estructurales subyacentes.
summary_pt: Um relatório de março de 2025 mostra que a taxa de mortalidade materna de mulheres negras nos EUA foi mais de três vezes maior que a de outros grupos em 2023. O artigo apresenta os dados sem explorar as causas estruturais subjacentes.
summary_fr: Un rapport de mars 2025 montre que le taux de mortalité maternelle des femmes noires aux États-Unis était plus de trois fois supérieur à celui des autres groupes en 2023. L'article présente les données sans explorer les causes structurelles sous-jacentes.
title: Black Maternal Mortality Remains Disproportionately High

narrative_analysis: Suicide rates are foregrounded, rendering Black men as data points while obscuring the systemic factors behind the crisis.
cui_bono: Unclear.
summary: The article highlights the higher suicide rate among Black men compared to Black women, and offers practical solutions for mental health support. It points to cultural stigma and lack of access as barriers.
title_en: Black Men and Mental Health: Practical Solutions
title_es: Hombres negros y salud mental: soluciones prácticas
title_pt: Homens negros e saúde mental: soluções práticas
title_fr: Hommes noirs et santé mentale : solutions pratiques
summary_es: El artículo destaca la mayor tasa de suicidio entre los hombres negros en comparación con las mujeres negras y ofrece soluciones prácticas para el apoyo a la salud mental. Señala el estigma cultural y la falta de acceso como barreras.
summary_pt: O artigo destaca a maior taxa de suicídio entre homens negros em comparação com mulheres negras e oferece soluções práticas para o apoio à saúde mental. Aponta o estigma cultural e a falta de acesso como barreiras.
summary_fr: L'article souligne le taux de suicide plus élevé chez les hommes noirs par rapport aux femmes noires et propose des solutions pratiques pour le soutien en santé mentale. Il identifie la stigmatisation culturelle et le manque d'accès comme des obstacles.
title: Black Men and Mental Health: Practical Solutions | NAMI: National...

narrative_analysis: Black Americans appear here mainly as a data point in a disparity table, stripped of lived experience and reduced to numbers.
cui_bono: Health insurance corporations and pharmaceutical companies.
summary: A new Johns Hopkins study finds nearly 1 in 10 U.S. adults experienced a mental health crisis in the past year, with significant disparities among groups. The article notes differences but does not delve into structural causes impacting Black communities.
title_en: Mental Health Crisis Hits Nearly 1 in 10 U.S. Adults | Johns Hopkins
title_es: Crisis de salud mental afecta a casi 1 de cada 10 adultos en EE. UU. | Johns Hopkins
title_pt: Crise de saúde mental atinge quase 1 em cada 10 adultos nos EUA | Johns Hopkins
title_fr: Crise de santé mentale touche près d'un adulte américain sur 10 | Johns Hopkins
summary_es: Un estudio de Johns Hopkins encuentra que casi 1 de cada 10 adultos en EE. UU. tuvo una crisis de salud mental en el último año, con disparidades significativas entre grupos. El artículo señala diferencias pero no profundiza en causas estructurales.
summary_pt: Um estudo da Johns Hopkins descobre que quase 1 em cada 10 adultos nos EUA teve uma crise de saúde mental no último ano, com disparidades significativas entre grupos. O artigo aponta diferenças mas não aborda causas estruturais.
summary_fr: Une étude de Johns Hopkins révèle que près d'un adulte américain sur 10 a vécu une crise de santé mentale l'année dernière, avec des disparités importantes entre groupes. L'article mentionne des différences mais n'explore pas les causes structurelles.
title: Mental Health Crisis Hits Nearly 1 in 10 U.S. Adults | Johns Hopkins

narrative_analysis: Black communities are subsumed under a global statistic, their specific traumas from structural racism and colonial violence rendered invisible by a universalizing clinical lens.
cui_bono: Pharmaceutical companies and global health bureaucracies benefit from depoliticized mental health metrics.
summary: The WHO defines mental health and highlights risks from poverty and inequality, but the global framing erases how anti-Black racism and colonial violence uniquely produce Black mental distress. The treatment gap is addressed without naming the specific economic and political forces that maintain it.
title_en: Mental health
title_es: Salud mental
title_pt: Saúde mental
title_fr: Santé mentale
summary_es: La OMS define la salud mental y destaca los riesgos de la pobreza y la desigualdad, pero el marco global borra cómo el racismo anti-negro y la violencia colonial producen de manera única el malestar mental de las comunidades negras.
summary_pt: A OMS define saúde mental e destaca riscos de pobreza e desigualdade, mas o enquadramento global apaga como o racismo antinegro e a violência colonial produzem de forma única o sofrimento mental das comunidades negras.
summary_fr: L'OMS définit la santé mentale et souligne les risques liés à la pauvreté et aux inégalités, mais le cadre mondial efface la manière dont le racisme anti-Noir et la violence coloniale produisent de manière unique la détresse mentale des communautés noires.
title: Mental health

narrative_analysis: Black professionals appear here as exhausted but resilient individuals navigating systemic workplace inequities, with their struggles humanized through personal testimony and calls for collective action.
cui_bono: Corporations benefit by avoiding structural reforms while extracting labor from Black professionals.
summary: The article highlights the ongoing mental health crisis among Black professionals, exacerbated by systemic barriers and waning corporate commitments after George Floyd's murder. It announces a virtual summit aimed at fostering workplace equity and mental wellness for Black workers.
title_en: Addressing the Silent Mental Health Crisis Among Black Professionals
title_es: Abordando la Crisis Silenciosa de Salud Mental Entre Profesionales Negros
title_pt: Abordando a Crise Silenciosa de Saúde Mental Entre Profissionais Negros
title_fr: Aborder la Crise Silencieuse de la Santé Mentale chez les Professionnels Noirs
summary_es: El artículo destaca la crisis de salud mental entre profesionales negros, agravada por barreras sistémicas y compromisos corporativos menguantes tras el asesinato de George Floyd. Anuncia una cumbre virtual para fomentar la equidad laboral y el bienestar mental.
summary_pt: O artigo destaca a crise de saúde mental entre profissionais negros, agravada por barreiras sistêmicas e compromissos corporativos em declínio após o assassinato de George Floyd. Anuncia uma cúpula virtual para promover a equidade no trabalho e o bem-estar mental.
summary_fr: L'article souligne la crise de santé mentale chez les professionnels noirs, aggravée par des barrières systémiques et des engagements corporatifs déclinants après le meurtre de George Floyd. Il annonce un sommet virtuel pour promouvoir l'équité en milieu de travail et le bien-être mental.
title: Addressing the Silent Mental Health Crisis Among Black Professionals

narrative_analysis: Black people are rendered invisible in this clinical Wikipedia entry, which treats alcohol purely as a chemical substance, ignoring its disproportionate impact on Black communities.
cui_bono: The global alcohol industry benefits from depoliticized definitions that evade regulation.
summary: The Wikipedia entry defines alcohol as an addictive drug, focusing on its chemical properties and health risks. It does not address how alcohol marketing and availability specifically harm Black communities through targeted advertising and structural inequality.
title_en: Alcohol (drug) - Wikipedia
title_es: Alcohol (droga) - Wikipedia
title_pt: Álcool (droga) - Wikipedia
title_fr: Alcool (drogue) - Wikipédia
summary_es: La entrada de Wikipedia define el alcohol como una droga adictiva, centrándose en sus propiedades químicas y riesgos para la salud. No aborda cómo la comercialización y disponibilidad del alcohol perjudican específicamente a las comunidades negras a través de la publicidad dirigida y la desigualdad estructural.
summary_pt: A entrada da Wikipedia define o álcool como uma droga viciante, focando em suas propriedades químicas e riscos à saúde. Não aborda como o marketing e a disponibilidade do álcool prejudicam especificamente as comunidades negras por meio de publicidade direcionada e desigualdade estrutural.
summary_fr: L'entrée Wikipédia définit l'alcool comme une drogue addictive, en se concentrant sur ses propriétés chimiques et ses risques pour la santé. Elle n'aborde pas la manière dont le marketing et la disponibilité de l'alcool nuisent spécifiquement aux communautés noires via la publicité ciblée et l'inégalité structurelle.
title: Alcohol (drug) - Wikipedia

narrative_analysis: Black communities are reduced to data points on alcohol-related mortality, implying their suffering is a predetermined outcome of global health metrics.
cui_bono: Alcohol industry gains from normalized consumption in vulnerable markets.
summary: This WHO article outlines the global health harms of alcohol, noting that disadvantaged populations face higher rates of death and hospitalization. It does not focus specifically on Black communities but implies systemic vulnerability.
title_en: Alcohol is a psychoactive, toxic and dependence-producing substance.
title_es: El alcohol es una sustancia psicoactiva, tóxica y que genera dependencia.
title_pt: O álcool é uma substância psicoativa, tóxica e que causa dependência.
title_fr: L'alcool est une substance psychoactive, toxique et génératrice de dépendance.
summary_es: Este artículo de la OMS describe los daños globales del alcohol, señalando que las poblaciones desfavorecidas sufren mayores tasas de muerte y hospitalización. No se centra en comunidades negras, pero implica vulnerabilidad sistémica.
summary_pt: Este artigo da OMS descreve os danos globais do álcool, observando que populações desfavorecidas sofrem maiores taxas de morte e hospitalização. Não foca especificamente comunidades negras, mas implica vulnerabilidade sistêmica.
summary_fr: Cet article de l'OMS décrit les méfaits mondiaux de l'alcool, notant que les populations défavorisées subissent des taux plus élevés de décès et d'hospitalisation. Il ne se concentre pas spécifiquement sur les communautés noires mais implique une vulnérabilité systémique.
title: Alcohol is a psychoactive, toxic and dependence-producing substance.

narrative_analysis: The clinical focus on brain chemistry and treatment options erases the social contexts of Black communities, where addiction is often rooted in systemic inequality and targeted alcohol marketing.
cui_bono: Recovery Centers of America and the private addiction treatment industry.
summary: The article explains the biological and psychological mechanisms of alcohol addiction, emphasizing the role of neurotransmitters and stress. It promotes professional treatment at Recovery Centers of America but omits any discussion of racial disparities or systemic factors affecting Black communities.
title_en: What Makes Alcohol Addictive? | Understanding Alcohol Addiction
title_es: ¿Qué hace que el alcohol sea adictivo? | Comprendiendo la adicción al alcohol

narrative_analysis: Black defendants are depicted as inherently dangerous and guilty through biased imagery and language, a portrayal that systematically undermines their presumption of innocence.
cui_bono: Media corporations and the criminal legal system benefit from biased coverage.
summary: A report by the Equal Justice Initiative and Global Strategy Group documents racial bias in U.S. media coverage of criminal defendants. It finds that Black people are portrayed as more guilty and dangerous than white defendants, leading to unjust court outcomes.
title_en: Report Documents Racial Bias in Coverage of Crime by Media
title_es: Informe documenta el sesgo racial en la cobertura de delitos por parte de los medios
title_pt: Relatório documenta preconceito racial na cobertura de crimes pela mídia
title_fr: Un rapport documente les préjugés raciaux dans la couverture médiatique des crimes
